programme.title: FailArmy Bad Resolutions

programme.desc: Trivia brought to you by 90s nostalgia!

programme.title: FailFactory
programme.desc: A lot of pain without the gain.

programme.title: FailArmy Now
programme.desc: What bad decisions, pants and New Year have in common.

programme.title: FailArmy Presents: Party Animals
programme.desc: A special dedicated to wild animals who know how to party it up.

programme.title: Dance Mania
programme.desc: FailArmy celebrates the inner dancer in everyone with the ultimate dance fails compilation.

programme.title: Humans Vs. Everything
programme.desc: From gusty winds to fiery flames, humans face off against the unstoppable elements.

programme.title: Humans Vs. Everything
programme.desc: Feathered foes strike back; witnessing humans in hilarious battles with their beaked nemeses.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 4
programme.desc: The best poker players in the world at HyperX Esports Arena to play for $440,000 and the title of \\"Champion of Champions.\\" WPT commentator Tony Dunst is at the final table to battle against Ole Schemion, Nick Schulman, and more!
programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 4

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 2
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 4
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT1
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT2
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 1
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.
programme.sub-title: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 1

programme.sub-title: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 3

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Uruguay - Part 1
programme.desc: Six players enter the luxury Enjoy Punta Del Este resort looking to win $110,000 and this prestigious WPT title with 410 players down to six.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Rockstar Energy Cash Game - Part 1

programme.title: Andromeda: Dommens dag, Vredens dag
programme.desc: Mannskapet installerer en ny AI i et nytt Commonwealth-slagskip, og naturlig nok går ikke ting som de skal.

programme.title: Andromeda: Skygger kastet av en siste hilsen
programme.desc: Tyr overbeviser Nietzscheans at han er reinkarnasjonen til Drago Museveni.
programme.sub-title: Skygger kastet av en siste hilsen

programme.title: Andromeda: Svar gitt på spørsmål som aldri er stilt
programme.desc: En melding fra en samler sender Dylan på et oppdrag for å redde et gissel og finne restene av Commonwealth-flåten.
programme.sub-title: Svar gitt på spørsmål som aldri er stilt

programme.title: Andromeda: Biter av åtte
programme.desc: Citizen Eight prøver å fjerne Dylan fra kommandoen over Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Waking the Tyrant's Device
programme.desc: Mannskapet må stoppe en verdensbygger før han setter i gang en annen invasjon.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbelt eller ingenting
programme.desc: Dylan blir kidnappet av Nietzscheans og tvunget til å spille tankespill til underholdning for fangene hans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Harper/Slett
programme.desc: To Nietzschean-søsken er i en avstand over et våpen som kan eliminere høyere hjernefunksjoner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Snart den nærende virvelen
programme.desc: Tyr kommer tilbake, etter å ha sluttet seg til Collectors, og krever aldersruten fra sine tidligere besetningsmedlemmer.

programme.title: Andromeda: Verden snur seg rundt henne
programme.desc: En gisselsituasjon oppstår når mannskapet konfronterer Tyr.

programme.title: Andromeda: Kanal til skjebne
programme.desc: En feil sving i glidestrømmen fører Andromeda til et fengselsopprør.

programme.title: Andromeda: Machines of the Mind
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet går opp for å finne ut hvem som drepte en gruppe forskere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Opphøyet grunn, strålende datter
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet går opp for å finne ut hvem som drepte en gruppe forskere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Torment, the Release
programme.desc: Samlerne kontrollerer nå Commonwealth og setter Andromeda-mannskapet for retten.

programme.title: Andromeda: Spider's Stratagem
programme.desc: Andromeda oppdager en forsendelse med biorustning.

programme.title: Andromeda: Varmen fra et usynlig lys
programme.desc: En eksperimentell tilsløringsenhet slipper Dylan inn i et alternativt univers.

programme.title: Andromeda: De andre
programme.desc: Andromeda blir fanget i en krig mellom to skip, og den inkluderer en dødelig sykdom.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt brenner ned til aske
programme.desc: Dylan blir lurt av Rev og kidnappet. Mannskapet finner en uventet alliert i en samler.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tapt i et rom som ikke er der
programme.desc: Abyss har smittet Beka. Mannskapet må finne en måte å redde henne på.
programme.sub-title: Tapt i et rom som ikke er der

programme.title: Andromeda: Forkortelse av djevelens skille
programme.desc: Etter at noe av mannskapet er fanget, blir Harper tvunget til å jobbe på en tidsbro for patriarken.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stoler på Gordian Maze
programme.desc: En spion fra Tri Gemma dukker opp på Andromeda i et forsøk på å stjele stjernekartet.

programme.title: Andromeda: En symmetri av ufullkommenhet
programme.desc: Når Rommie blir for emosjonell, kutter skipet hennes tilgang til diagnostikk.

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High 'n Dry
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-be Killer
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a popular young man, investigators faced the daunting task of searching for one boat among 1200 others.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue ? a flaw on a mailing envelope ? exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.desc: This episode includes: Pix of the Dead, Johnny Lee Wilson (Pts. 1 & 2 + UD) and Totally Exhausted.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 12

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 15

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 20

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 21

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 22
programme.desc: This episode includes: Tunnel of Cocaine & UD, Update: War of the Depues, G.I. Dad & UD, Singles Bar & UD and J.J's Journey & UD.

programme.desc: This episode includes: Bentwaters UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Dungeons & Dragons, and I.D. Swap & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 2

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 4

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Held For Ransom
programme.desc: Wealth has its rewards, but it also brings its dangers. Kidnapping is one of them. No ordeal is more horrifying for a family than to have a child taken.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Vanished
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Unlawful Flight
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bodies of Evidence
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Loved To Death
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Betrayed
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives: False Witness
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner's Casebook
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Blooded
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: To Kill Again
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Proof Of Innocence
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Discoveries
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Federal Offense
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack  whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons  the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Living In Terror
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Women Who Kill
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Infallible Witness
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental "brain fingerprinting" technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Traces Of Guilt
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence: a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Unexpected Haunted Adventure
programme.desc: The team heads to Lydiate Abbey to investigate claims of a ghostly white lady and stumble upon a totally hidden gem deep in the woods, which has its own spirits haunting.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Ordsall Hall
programme.desc: Ordsall Hall is over 820 years old. It has been put to many uses including a family home, working men's club and church hall. With over 15 hauntings and many sightings, Ordsall Hall will certainly keep the team busy.

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Haunted Parade
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters travel to Hoylake and investigate a building known as The Parade. Dating back to 1909, this once former school, still seems to have ghostly pupils and teachers taking class.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Social Club for the Paranormal
programme.desc: Bex and Sean delve deep into a building that has survived world wars and is home to some very social ghosts. They come face to face with an angry spirit too, and something strange appears to be lurking in the basement.
programme.sub-title: A Social Club for the Paranormal

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: House of Hauntings
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean head to New Mills and investigate a home situated on the grounds of death and destruction from the bombings of WW2. Will any of the spirits lost in this disaster come forward and make contact during the investigation today?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Altrincham, Greater Manchester to investigate The Old Market Tavern. Once used as a coaching inn and a court house, many spirits still lurk here and Sean captures one of the most clearest EVP's ever.
programme.sub-title: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his paranormal investigation at The Old Market Tavern and he appears to have attracted the attention of spirit that launches a physical attack on him. Will he survive the night?
programme.sub-title: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Astley Green to the infamous Astley Green Colliery Museum. So many reports of paranormal activity have been confirmed at the mine, from lost miners to tormented souls.
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation into Astley Green Colliery Museum and attempts to make further contact with the souls and spirits who have lost their lives there. Will he succeed?
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2

programme.title: Past Hunters: Knutsford Crown Court – Part 1
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters travel to Knutsford and investigate a former Crown Court. Multiple people have been sentenced to death and life in prison, but will the team encounter any of its former inmates tonight?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Knutsford Crown Court – Part 2
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters continue their investigation of Knutsford Crown Court. As they delve deeper into the building, will the ghosts and spirits make contact through Derek?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Leeds and investigates Abbey House Museum among a maze of Victorian streets and shops. Who will he bump into tonight and what secrets does this location hold?
programme.sub-title: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Abbey House Museum and ventures outside into the monastery ruins. Will he find the ghostly monk tonight?
programme.sub-title: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Legh Arms Historic Hauntings Part 1
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean travel to Knutsford, Cheshire and visit the Legh Arms.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Legh Arms Historic Hauntings Part 2
programme.desc: A 16th Century pub that has a haunted history. The duo come into direct contact with spirits haunting the location. Even during the day there is no shortage of ghostly activity, on this lock down special paranormal Ghost Dimension investigation.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Loud Ghosts of The Hall
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension continue their investigation into Champness Hall and come face to face with paranormal activity that is caught on camera and seek out the paranormal entities haunting the location.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Halloween Special (2019)
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension is an exciting paranormal show that takes investigations to a whole new level.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: What Haunts Inside?
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension is an exciting paranormal show that takes investigations to a whole new level.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can he redeem himself?
programme.sub-title: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!
programme.sub-title: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, Get Him Out!
programme.desc: Kelly’s ex-husband Nikki continues to haunt her. He went to jail for killing her 2 week old son and is now dating her 18 year old daughter! Can Steve get Nikki out of their lives forever?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother in Denial
programme.desc: When ordinary people need help, Steve Wilkos is ready to answer the call. Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves and fight for what he believes in order to promote justice for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother's Rage
programme.desc: Three years later, Elizabeth still carries strong doubts about Manny's intentions with her family and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is Manny innocent?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to neglect and abuse her kids. Scott’s fiancée stepped up as a mother and Stephanie failed multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the kids, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
programme.desc: Maria claims that her son’s ex Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says Maria is a racist and angry over raising her grandchild in a Hispanic home!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: What Happened to My Baby?
programme.desc: Baby Garrett died of an oxycodone drug overdose while in Sharon’s care. His mother Casey left him with Sharon so she could visit her husband Kenneth in the hospital. Who’s responsible?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Wait! Don't Read The Results Yet Steve...
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to live with them just because she’s the mother of his child.
programme.sub-title: Wait! Don't Read The Results Yet Steve...

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Is My Husband the Abuser?
programme.desc: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her problematic ex Scott. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Fake Your Pregnancies?
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Accident
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Starving Myself to Death
programme.desc: Pamela aims to weigh 40 pounds. Samantha, who suffers from bulimia and alcoholism, steals to accomplish her binging. Can both women confront their eating disorders with support and treatment?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Crawl to Your Wife
programme.desc: After surviving a wild car chase, losing her leg, and being comatose due to her husband, Portia will finally confront him. He won't admit fault, but today Steve’s helping Portia find her voice.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!
programme.sub-title: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
programme.desc: Jennifer left home to protect herself from her stepdad Allen. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken family?
programme.sub-title: You Stole 15 Years of My Life

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Is My Property
programme.desc: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Slept With THAT Man?
programme.desc: LaShawna and her boyfriend James will learn if her friend Coral harmed her child years ago. She’ll also admit that she cheated with Coral. How will he react when he finds out another bombshell?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Razor’s Edge
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff’s deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight--then he’s found dead in his patrol car the next morning.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A party on the outskirts of the city turns into a nightmare for some teenagers when they discover a woman’s corpse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Weapon of Choice
programme.desc: When mother of two Shaundra Murr is run over in front of her house, officers initially suspect a hit and run. Until Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers evidence proving Shaundra’s murder was a crime of passion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Slaughterhouse Six
programme.desc: Solider and young father Layne Schmidtke is brutally beaten to death by a mob of teenagers. Kenda must reconstruct the chaotic scene through forensic evidence and witness testimonies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Call for Murder
programme.desc: Five people are shot in a cold-blooded robbery. With much of the evidence lost in a fire set by the suspect. An exhaustive manhunt ends in a chilling confrontation with an Eagle Scout turned killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.
programme.sub-title: Bullet With My Name On It

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: End of Days
programme.desc: The discovery of a family home littered with corpses tasks Kenda with unspooling the paranoid obsessions of a diseased mind, and forces him to confront his greatest fear.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence
programme.desc: 29yr old Chris is shot in cold blood outside a neighborhood bar. Faced with a trio of suspects, Kenda trusts his gut and makes a controversial decision.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: Kenda encounters one of the most horrendous crime scenes of his career, but his hunt for a homicidal maniac leads him to the most unexpected of killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. LA
programme.desc: A young man tries to flee a violent scene, but is shot dead behind the wheel of his car. A peculiar clue puts Kenda hot on the heels of a self-styled gangster with revenge on his mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Collision Course
programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street. When a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bump In the Night
programme.desc: When a pretty, young pilot is found in bed, bound and with a bullet in her head, Lt. Joe Kenda must determine if this was a random assault or payback for something that happened in the skies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Man Falling
programme.desc: When a family of four is brutally murdered, it sends a shockwave of fear through the town. Police believe they have a spree killer on their hands, until Lt. Joe Kenda discovers a gruesome connection.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: the corpse of a man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home. Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: The Hills: When Lauren's Away...
programme.desc: Når Lauren drar på ferie med familien, ting går galt i Los Angeles. Stephanie dater Doug bak Laurens rygg, og Audrina og Heidi blir venner.

programme.title: The Hills: Don't Act Innocent
programme.desc: Sannheten om Stephanies forhold til Laurens eks Doug kommer til slutt fram når de alle møtes på Dougs poolparty. Heidis mor kommer overraskende på besøk til LA og havner i en konfrontasjon med Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: If She Never Met Spencer...
programme.desc: Lauren får et brev fra Heidi hvor hun beklager og innser at det er bare én ting som hindrer dem fra å bli venner igjen. Audrina starter å date en ny fyr for å gjøre Justin sjalu, men planen går feil.

programme.title: The Hills: Who To Choose?
programme.desc: Audrina møter sin gamle flamme Corey igjen og sjonglerer plutselig to gutter. Spencer tvinger Heidi til å sparke ut søsteren hennes Holly fra leiligheten.

programme.title: The Hills: You'll Never Have This
programme.desc: Lauren og Audrina reiser til Cabo for Brody bursdag, men når Justin blir sjalu av Audrinas nye forhold, blir festen en slåsskamp. Spencer ydmyker Stephanie etter å funnet ut at hennes nye kjæreste er venn med Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: I Want You To Be With Me
programme.desc: Lauren prøver å skape fred mellom Brody og Stephanie. Audrina ønsker å få ting til å fungere med Corey, men Justin vil ikke gi slipp på henne. Stephanie tviler på sin nye kjæreste etter at han bryter sitt løfte om å stå opp mot Brody.
programme.sub-title: I Want You To Be With Me

programme.title: The Hills: It's Her Move
programme.desc: Audrina får sitt eget sted, og håper at Justin vil flytte inn hos henne, men alle frykter at hun flytter av feil grunn. Heidi inviterer Spencer til et arrangement med jobben, og blir tatt i å ha litt for mye moro.

programme.title: The Hills: Back To New York
programme.desc: Whitney reiser til New York og den nye gutten Jay stjeler oppmerksomheten hennes. Heidi er nedfor etter å ha fått sparken, og da Spencer snakker med Brent for å få jobben hennes tilbake, gjør han bare situasjonen verre.

programme.title: The Hills: One Last Chance
programme.desc: Lauren lar Heidis søster sove over hos seg. Justin ber Audrina med på tur for en romantisk helg, og Heidis frustrasjon med Spencer vokser etter at hun må tigge for å få jobben tilbake.

programme.title: The Hills: You Did This
programme.desc: Audrina tror på et rykte hun hører: at Lauren har rotet med Justin. I mellomtiden prøver Holly å få Heidi bort fra Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: It's About Trust
programme.desc: Audrina forsøker å redde vennskapet med Lauren etter å ha anklaget henne for å rote med Justin. Spencer og Stephanie besøker bestemoren deres, som er lei av at de krangler.

programme.title: The Hills: Dream Boy, Dream Job
programme.desc: Whitney blir tilbudt drømmejobben i NYC og håper å få møte Jay der. Lauren blir nostalgisk da foreldrene selger huset i Laguna Beach, og Stephanie ber Spencer om hjelp da hun ikke klarer å bestemme seg for hva hun skal gjøre med Cameron.

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. & Mrs. Pratt
programme.desc: Spencer og Heidi ignorerer bekymringene til sine familier og stikker av til Mexico for å gifte seg. Whitney tar en sjanse på drømmejobben i New York City, og sier farvel til Lauren og sitt liv i Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills: I Heidi Take Thee Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren og Heidi møter på hverandre, og husker hvorfor de pleide å være venner. Spencer og Heidi har akkurat giftet seg da Heidis mor kommer til byen. Justin sjokkerer Audrina når han tar henne til Palm Springs for en overraskelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Don't Cry On Your Birthday
programme.desc: Når Heidi kommer til overraskelsesfesten på bursdagen til Lauren, gråter de to gamle vennene for vennskapet som har gått i oppløsning. Spencer starter en voldelig nevekamp når Cameron anklager ham for å ha plukket opp en bartender.

programme.title: The Hills: Everything Happens for a Reason
programme.desc: Spencers sjarm fører Heidi hjem til Colorado, der gjenopptar hun kontakten med en gammel flamme. Lauren forteller Stephanie hva hun syns om at Heidi kom i bursdagsselskapet. Spencer snakker med Brody igjen etter en lang tids taushet.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Etter at Heidi tar Spencer på fersken på en nattklubb med bartenderen Stacie, krever hun at de skal gå i parterapi. Lauren setter ryktet sitt på spill når hun skaffer Stephanie en praktikantplass hos People's Revolution.

programme.title: The Hills: Crazy In Love
programme.desc: Audrina forsøker å komme over Justin ved å kaste sitt blikk på Brody i stedet. Heidi sleper en motvillig Spencer til parterapi. Når Stephanie går i baret hos People's Revolution, truer Lauren med å sparke henne.

programme.title: The Hills: I Always Had A Little Crush
programme.desc: Når jentene krasjer guttenes Hawaii tur, prøver Valeria å glemme Justin ved å flørte med Brordy. Heidis ekskjæreste, som er jomfru, kommer på besøk og Heidi håper at Spenser skal lære noe av eksens verdier.
programme.sub-title: I Always Had A Little Crush

programme.title: The Hills: Playmates Bring the Drama
programme.desc: Audrina fortviler når Brodys kjæreste konfronterer henne med Hawaii, og Brody gjør ingenting for å stoppe det. Heidi oppdager en tekstmelding fra Stacie til Spencer og drar til nattklubben for å konfrontere henne med det.

programme.title: The Hills: Hi Lauren, It's Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren er usikker på om hun skal gå i Heidis bryllup etter at Spencer endelig har bedt om unnskyldning. Brody nekter å risikere forholdet sitt til Jayde for å redde vennskapet med Audrina, og Stephanie konfronterer Kelly Cutrone.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: I Laurens siste episode må hun bestemme om hun er villig til å tilgi Spencer for å kunne stille opp for Heidi i hennes "prinsesse"-bryllup. Hele besetningen dukker opp og blir overrasket over en gjest ingen tenkte ville komme.

programme.title: The Hills: It's On Bitch
programme.desc: Kristin starter krig når hun forsøker seg på Justin foran Audrina. Spencer og Heidi leter etter hus, og Spencer kjøper et hus uten Heidis godkjennelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Mess With Me, I Mess With You
programme.desc: Etter at Audrina ikke dukket opp, bestemmer Kristin seg for ikke å kjempe mot sine følelser for Justin. Heidi melder seg som barnevakt for naboen, men Spencer vil ikke ha noe med unger å gjøre.
programme.sub-title: Mess With Me, I Mess With You

programme.title: The Hills: Strike One
programme.desc: Kristin får smake på hvordan det er å ha et forhold til Justin når han ikke dukker opp på Brodys overraskelsesfest. Heidi og Spencer er uenige om når de skal starte familie, og Audrina dater Justins bestevenn.

programme.title: The Hills: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: Kristin tror hun har temmet Justin, men kanskje er han fortsatt ikke over Audrina. Når Holly mister kontrollen på en tilstelning, er det Heidis jobb å få søsteren til å innrømme alkoholproblemet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: Sorry Boo, Strike Two
programme.desc: Justin gjør seg kostbar med Kristin, men biter seg i halen. Hollys drikking fører til at Heidi og Stephanie må gripe inn. Brody og Jayde krangler slik at de må revurdere forholdet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Justin går på glør etter at Kristin og Audrina endelig møtes ansikt til ansikt. Alt Heidi ønsker seg til bursdag er en baby, men Spencer har helt andre planer.

programme.title: The Hills: On To The Next
programme.desc: Kristin og Brody vurderer å date igjen, men når de støter på Jayde forstår de at tiden ikke er moden. Audrina og Justin møtes for å diskutere framtiden, men det ender ikke som hun håpet. Spencer går drastisk til verks mot Heidis babybesettelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Can't Always Get What You Want
programme.desc: Kristin støter sammen med Jayde når hun kommer for å gjenerobre Brody. Heidi legger en plan for å bli gravid med eller uten Spencers samtykke, og Audrina må takle at Justin fortsatt har følelser for Kristin.
programme.sub-title: Can't Always Get What You Want

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. Right Now
programme.desc: Kristin vil ikke ha Justin, men han gir henne ikke opp så lett. Audrina avslutter forholdet til Justin for godt. Brody får kalde føtter når Jayde vil flytte inn hos ham, og Spencer frykter at Heidi muligens kan være gravid.

programme.title: The Hills: The Boys Of Summer
programme.desc: Kristin og Justin vil gå videre med forholdet, og Spencer konfronterer Heidi med graviditetstesten. Brody har kanskje fortsatt følelser for Kristin etter at Jayde konfronterer ham med tilstanden til deres forhold på en forlovelsesfest.

programme.title: The Hills: Put On A Happy Face
programme.desc: Heidis hjemkomst blir ødelagt når moren hennes misliker hennes plastisk kirurgi. Kristin og jentene drar til Miami for Super Bowl-helgen, men det blir dårlig stemning når den harde festingen hennes begynner å bekymre Audrina, Lo og Stephanie.

programme.title: The Hills: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Når ryktene begynner å spres om Kristins festing, får Stephanie skylden. Audrina starter å date en ny fyr, men det stopper ikke Brody fra å prøve seg på henne. Spencer blir opprørt når han møter på Stephanie på Kristins fest.

programme.title: The Hills: The Elephant In The Room
programme.desc: Heidi arrangerer en fest for naboen hennes, men det blir overskygget av at Spencer blir sint på Holly. Kristin oppfordrer Audrina til å forplikte seg til Ryan, og prøver deretter å komme nærmere Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: This Is Goodbye
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencers oppførsel fører til at deres venner og familie tar et vanskelig valg. Kristin og Brody roter, men er enige om å fortsette som single. Ryan skuffer Audrina når han ikke dukker opp for en kveld på byen.

programme.title: The Hills: A New Bird
programme.desc: Brody risikerer sitt vennskap med Kristin når han begynner å date ei annen jente. Lo setter Stephanie opp på en dobbeldate. Ryan gir Audrinas venner en ny sjanse.

programme.title: The Hills: Ghost From The Past
programme.desc: Kristin sliter med å gå videre etter Brody. Audrina møter på Justin og begynner å tvile på sitt forhold til Ryan. Lo blir venn med Brodys nye kjæreste.

programme.title: The Hills: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: Brodys nye flamme gjør en fiende av Kristin når hun tar med seg en gammel rival av Kristins på en fest. Ryan kommer tilbake fra turneen, men Audrina forteller ham ikke at hun møtte Justin mens han var borte.

programme.title: The Hills: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place
programme.desc: Audrinas forhold til Ryan blir satt på prøve når han møter Justin for første gang. Brody er på Kristins side når Allie krangler med henne. Stephanie har en skuffende andre date.
programme.sub-title: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place

programme.title: The Hills: Break-Up to Make-Up
programme.desc: Akkurat da Audrina avslutter ting med Ryan, overrasker Justin henne på bursdagen hennes. McKaelas venn Allie lager mer trøbbel med Kristin. Brody forteller Justin hva han tenker.

programme.title: The Hills: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: På en surfetur til Costa Rica, gjør Kristin Brody sjalu ved å rote med en lokal bartender, Audrina prøver å bekjempe hennes tiltrekning til Justin, og Stephanie finner seg selv på kant med jungelmiljøet.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Reunited Doesn't Feel So Good
programme.desc: Sparis forhold med Shayla når bristepunktet da Spari velger side i villadramatikken. En samtale med Kamie får Thailah til å stille spørsmål om sitt forhold til Jamie.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: This Is What Hearbreak Feels Like
programme.desc: Huset står på tuppa da et pars forsøk på å fikse forholdet, ender i hjertesorg. Parenes forenelighet betviles under Refleksjonsseremonien, og sjokkerende resultat får noen til å tvile på om de skal bli sammen eller slå opp.
programme.sub-title: This Is What Hearbreak Feels Like

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Now Or Never
programme.desc: Parene bestemmer seg for å forlove seg eller slå opp for godt under Frieriseremonien. Spari og Shayla har en åpenhjertig samtale. Kamie inviterer noen overraskende gjester for å feire parenes endelige avgjørlser.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Love at First Sight
programme.desc: Åtte singelkjendiser møtes i en luksusvilla. Gnistene fyker for Joey, Calum blir overrasket og Lateysha blir straks begeistret for en slemming. Den første kjendiseksen ankommer, men kommer alt til å slutte i tårer?

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Det blir for mye for Ellie når Joey og Lorena bare er opptatt av hverandre. Lateysha blir ignorert av Michael, men en sexy ny kjendis fører henne til den syvende himmel. Calum og Marisa fortsetter å flørte.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Will You Be My Girlfriend?
programme.desc: Calum splittes mellom to ekser, Marissa og nykommeren Victoria. Marissa er ikke glad. Joey har et stort spørsmål til Lorena og Ashley blir vennesonet.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: May The Best Man Win
programme.desc: Joey og Lorena er blitt offisielle, men noen truer lykken. David får kalde føtter med Laytesha, Ashley har flaks og Michael og Victoria kommer nærmere hverandre.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: A New Celeb's In Toon!
programme.desc: En spesiall kjendis kommer til festen på båten. Georgia innser at hun har tatt feil og Itay og Victorias tid er over.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Queen Has Arrived
programme.desc: Lateysha og David når bunnen da reality-dronningen Tiffany Pollard skaper dramatikk ved å avsløre Davids ekte følelser for Lateysha. Og to ekser forlater villaen for godt.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Battle of the Divas
programme.desc: Følelsene gnistrer da Victoria slites mellom Michael og en nyankommet. Lateysha eksploderer da Marissa flørter med David, og Joey fremfører en romantisk rap for Lorena.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Heartbreak
programme.desc: Den mest dramatiske og følelsesladde ankomsten noensinne gir Lorena hjertesorg, men blir det slutten for JOLO? Michael stoler på Ellie, men kommer han til å glemme Victoria?

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Joeys usikkerhet får overtaket da Lorena vil legge an på Patrick. David ber endelig Lateysha om unnskyldning og sjokkerende doble ekser kommer på stranden.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Calum's Choice
programme.desc: TOT gjør så Calum sender hjem en av eksene sine, Georgia blir sentimental med Ashley. Michael og Ellie blir nærmere "venner" og en overraskende kjendis er på gang.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Miles and the Mob Wife
programme.desc: Den nye kjendisen, Miles, gjør inntrykk på Marissa. David må kle på seg igjen og jentene må fatte en tøff avgjørelse.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: As One Door Closes Another One Opens
programme.desc: En av gutta blir sendt hjem og jentene gråter. Det hele blir for mye for en av de opprinnelige åtte. Sophie kan endelig ha truffet drømmemannen. Kommer David til å få en sjanse til?
programme.sub-title: As One Door Closes Another One Opens

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Mob Wife Goes In
programme.desc: Georgia og Miles kommer nærmere, men slutter alt i tårer? Marissa presses til sin "bande kone" grense og Joey og Lorena drar ned på stranden for den siste ankomsten.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Finale
programme.desc: Joey får sitt livs sjokk, en eks gjør en praktfull entre til den store finalen og Georgia blir rørt, men vil hun få en lykkelig slutt sammen med de andre parene?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ex On The Beach er tilbake! Åtte heite single får snart ødelagt tidenes ferie når en av eksene deres ankommer og ødelegger festen! Hat, krangler, tårer, drama, følelser og enda flere ekser!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: To ekser har ankommet villaen og skaper kaos - og det blir verre. Rogans forhold til Anita kan stå i fare for å ødelegges når eksen Jess ankommer. Mere kjærlighet, mere hat - og framfor alt: flere eks-kjærester!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Tre ekser har ankommet huset og det blir mer og mer spent. Kayleigh får vite at venninnen hennes Loren har kysset eksen hennes Adam, og når to ekser kommer samtidig får vi se et velkjent ansikt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Fem ekser befinner seg i villaen og alle er på tuppa etter at Gaz fra Geordie Shore kom dit. Gary prøver seg på Anita og de faller for hverandre, men eksen som knuste hjertet hennes, dukker opp av havet. Imens har Adam en helt forferdelig dag.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Joes ankomst sjokkerer alle og Anita blir helt ødelagt. Kayleigh lager drama og forteller Joe at Anita har rotet med to av guttene. Neste eks er et velkjent ansikt som kan ødelegge for Gaz og Anita. Velkommen Charlotte!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Will's Jeep Grand Wagoneer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Esmerelda's Pontiac Sunbird.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Terese's Ford LTD Crown Victoria Station Wagon.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Amber's Chevy Cavalier.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Louis' Subaru Impreza.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Andrew's Cadillac Fleetwood Hearse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: '72 Landcruiser
programme.desc: Gaby var en nylig dumpet yogainstruktør som ikke hadde noe i verden utenom yogamatten sin og sin Land Cruiser fra 1972. Ekskjæresten solgte bilen til henne for 200 dollar. Gutta begynner å jobbe med utsiden...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Escort
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Kerrys Ford Escort. Bilen var blitt sveiset og "limt sammen" av to separate biler. Gjengen mente den var trafikkfarlig...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit takes a beat-up 1984 Cadillac Eldorado and restores it to it's former glory.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and the boys at West Coast Customs transform a '91 Ford Escort into a European luxury mobile.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and West Coast Customs give a 1958 VW some California love, and turn it into the ultimate beach ride.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit takes a busted off-road '85 Suburban and gives it an electronic makeover not to be believed.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit puts the fire back into a wrecked '87 Chevy Blazer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and West Coast Customs help a 1988 Acura Legend live up to its name.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: When Xzibit rolls on into the garage with the Fairlane, the boys can't believe their eyes. So they decide to give West his Fairlane back to tinker with and get him a brand-new pimped Toyota 4Runner.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit and the boys at West Coast pimp Nate's Ford Econoline.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Sara's Chevrolet S-10.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Brooke's Chevrolet Cavalier Convertible.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Tom's Chevrolet Caprice.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps JT's Honda Civic.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Jekara's Chevrolet Bel Air.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Eric's Mitsubishi Eclipse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit and the boys at West Coast get an unforgettable surprise when they discover a previous tenant living inside a neglected 1976 Pacer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Josh's Toyota Corolla.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Heather's Chevrolet C10.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Tin's Dodge Caravan.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Alex's Chevrolet Chevelle Convertible.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Rashae's Ford Taurus.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Jake's Buick Century.

programme.title: iCarly: Pack rat
programme.desc: Carly må trå til når Spencer blir avhengig av et videospil. Sam lurer Freddie til å tro at han blir forfulgt av uhell når han nekter å sende et kjedebrev videre.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skylder deg en
programme.desc: Sam blir fornærmet når Freddie beskylder henne for ikke å betale ham og Carly noen av de pengene tilbake som hun konstant låner. Sam prøver iherdig å betale dem tilbake - hun finner seg en ordentlig jobb.

programme.title: iCarly: Hubert Lewbert
programme.desc: En "Lur Lewbert"-sketsj går helt galt og skader Carlys irriterende portvakt. Gjengen pleier ham inntil Freddies mor tar over. Men når kærligheten begynner å blomstre, må de sette en stopper for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Pie
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Spencer tar med Freddie til deres yndlingskonditori, finner de ut at eieren er død. Men enda verre er det at oppskriftene hans kanskje er gått tapt for alltid.

programme.title: iCarly: Jul
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å pifte opp julen med et utradisjonelt tre, kommer Spencer til å sette fyr på alle Carlys gaver. Fortvilet ønsker hun seg at hun hadde en normal bror.

programme.title: iCarly: Kysset
programme.desc: Sam overhører Freddie fortelle Carly at han aldri har kysset en jente, og avslører hemmeligheten hans på netshowet. Gibby og Carly trener Spencer til utttaket for det lokale, profesjonelle fotballaget.

programme.title: iCarly: Bilbråk
programme.desc: Gjengen holder en konkurranse på iCarly, og premien er en ny bil fra en lokal forhandler. Etter at Nevel vinner, oppdager barna at forhandleren ikke visste noe om konkurransen eller bilen de skulle ha donert bort som premie.

programme.title: iCarly: Fred
programme.desc: Freddie sier offentlig at han ikke er fan av internettsensasjonen Fred, noe som får Fred til å meddele at han skal slutte å legge ut filmer for alltid. Fansen blir rasende fordi Freddie har forårsaket slutten på de populære filmene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dobbelt opp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie sniker seg ut for å dra til en MMA-kamp, får de sine dobbeltgjengere til å lure Spencer til å tro at de fortsatt er hjemme. Imens bygger Spencer en kjempeversjon av Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly: Om hva for noe?
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie oppfordrer iCarly-fans til å stemme på David Archuleta i "Amerika Sings", syns de synd på nummer to og hjelper ham med å lage en musikkvideo.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skal gjøre Sam jentete
programme.desc: Da Sam innrømmer at hun liker en gutt på skolen, lærer Carly henne hvordan hun kan lokke ham til seg ved å oppføre seg mere feminint. Spencer er overbevist om at en jente liker ham pga. smokingen hans, så han går med den hele tiden.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjenforening med Missy
programme.desc: Da Carlys gamle venninne Missy flytter tilbake til Seattle, tror Sam at Missy prøver å skifte henne ut som Carlys bestevenninne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg må ha skap 239
programme.desc: Når Sam og Freddie begge to vinner konkurransen for skolens beste skap, slir de nødt til å dele skap. Carly ber Spencer gi henne timer i billedkunst.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly utdelingen
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie holder en iCarly-galla for de beste bruker-bidragene i iCarly, og hyller pristagerne live på web-showet. Spencer verver europeiske badedraktmodeller for å hjelpe ham å lage premiestatuettene.

programme.title: iCarly: Tvillinger
programme.desc: Freddie prøver å bevise at Melanie, Sams tvillingesøster, er Sam i forkledning. Når Carly underviser Spencers nemesis, Chuck, prøver Spencer å overbevise henne om at Chuck er ond.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 2
programme.desc: Når Carly oppdager at hennes tøffe kjæreste Griffin samler på små Pee Wee Babies, må hun ta stilling til om hun holder ut å date en kar som har en kosedyrsamling. I mens forsøker Spencer å hjelpe Sam med å bli kvitt et mareritt.

programme.title: iCarly: iKamp mot Dingo
programme.desc: Dingo-kanalen har stjålet idéer fra iCarly, så Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer drar til Dingos Studio for å fortelle manusforfatterne hva de mener om det.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg tror de kysset
programme.desc: Da Sam kommer til å avsløre overfor Carly at hun og Freddie smugkysset, konfronterer Carly dem med hvorfor de ikke fortalte henne om det. Og Spencer underviser fanger i billedkunst i fengselet.

programme.title: iCarly: Kokkekamp
programme.desc: Når Carl, Sam og Freddie vinner over en berømt tv-kokk i en matlagningskonkurranse, vil ikke kokken lage mat mer og nekter å komme ut av soverommet sitt. Spencer prøver å oppfylle en fremtidsdrøm.

programme.title: iCarly: Rektor kampen
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie får rektor Franklin sparket, overtar miss Briggs og mr. Howard ledelsen og innfører strenge regler. Og Spencer leier en gammel rodeostjerne til å lære ham å ri på en mekanisk okse.

programme.title: iCarly: iSpeed Date
programme.desc: Så mange gutter dukker opp til 'ta Carly med på fest'-konkurransen, at Carly, Sam og Freddie må benytte speed-dating for å møte dem alle sammen. Spencer følger et merkelig treningsprogram fra en ny app.

programme.title: iCarly: Stjernehjelp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie skal lage en musikkvideo til en popstjernes comeback, oppdager de at popstjernen er ute av form og talentløs. Og Spencer oppdager at kvinnen han dater er Gibbys mor.

programme.title: iCarly: Livredderen
programme.desc: Når Freddie redder livet til Carly, forelsker Carly seg i ham. Sam og Spencer kjemper mot hverandre i et painball-spill som heter Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly: Lewberts tapte kjærlighet
programme.desc: Når gjengen oppdager at Lewbert engang var en lykkelig ung mann som var forlovet med en vakker kvinne, setter de seg fore å gjenforene det adskilte paret.

programme.title: iCarly: Missekonkurransen
programme.desc: Sam avslører overfor Carly og Freddie at hun deltok i skjønnhetskonkurranser som liten. Da hun finner ut at hennes rival skal konkurrere i Seattle, overbeviser hun Carly om å stille opp mot henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: Etter at Sam plutselig må i fengsel, lover Carly og Freddie dyrt og hellig å ikke avlyse nettshowet ettersom faren hennes skal se det. Carly ber Spencer om hjelp, men det blir vanskelig, for han skal på date.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: En eksentrisk millionær ber Carly og vennene hennes om å sende det første nettshowet fra det ytre rom, så de må prøves ut for en romreise. Imens besøker en merkelig liten pike Spencer hjemme i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Freddie flytter ut
programme.desc: Freddie bestemmer seg for å flytte ut av leiligheten sin etter at moren hans har gjort ham flau. Carly, Sam og Freddie starter et firma og spesialiserer seg på bilder av kjæledyr.

programme.title: iCarly: iBeat the Heat
programme.desc: Når en hetebølge rammer Seattle og strømmen går, kommer Spencer til unnsetning med et norsk klimaanlegg.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: De medvirkende introduserer bloopers og bortklipte scener fra serien.

programme.title: iCarly: Rommet brenner
programme.desc: Spencer prøver å overraske Carly på bursdagen hennes, men ender opp med å brenne ned rommet hennes. Men når forsikringsselskapet gir ham en stor sjekk, har han sjansen til å gjøre det godt igjen.

programme.title: iCarly: Ja
programme.desc: Etter at en iCarly fan frir til kjæresten på nettshowet, blir gjengen nesten tvunget til å gå i bryllupet. Men når bruden får kalde føtter, må Carly komme til unnsetning.

programme.title: iCarly: T-skjortesalg
programme.desc: Gjengen begynner å selge Penny-skjorter, og når salget går susende, rekrutterer Sam barn fra 4. klasse for å bidra til å lage t-skjorter. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie er uenige om hvordan de skal behandles.

programme.title: iCarly: Rampestreker
programme.desc: Når hun blir ertet for aldri å ha funnet på en morsom spøk, rekrutterer Carly Spencer for å spøke med Sam og Freddie. Men etter at Spencer har fått sansen for det, kan han ikke slutte. Mob må finne en måte å stoppe ham på.

programme.title: iCarly: Moren til Sam
programme.desc: Etter å ha kranglet ned moren sin, flytter Sam inn til Carly, som snart innser at hun er en fryktelig gjest. Freddie blir forfulgt av en farlig kriminell etter å ha fanget ham på film da han begikk en forbrytelse.

programme.title: iCarly: Nevel trenger hjelp
programme.desc: Når en video av Nevel, som skriker til en liten jente, dukker opp på internett, blir Nevel hatet av alle. Men Nevel trygler iCarly-gjengen om hjelp for å redde sin ære.

programme.title: iCarly: Den kjekke assistenten
programme.desc: Carly og Sam ansetter en kjekk fyr som praktikant på nettshowet.

programme.title: iCarly: iOMG
programme.desc: Gjengen tilbringer kvelden med å fullføre sine prosjekter ved Ridgeway under den årlige skole-innlåsingen. Carly og Freddie mistenker at Sam er forelsket i sin nye venn Brad.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!
