programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Takeover
programme.desc: A political boss hires a professional provocateur to stage a violent protest, in a maneuver to discredit his state's governor and elevate his puppet, the mayor, to the governorship in "Takeover"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Missile
programme.desc: The IMF devises an elaborate scheme to dupe foreign agent James Reed into stealing a bogus missile guidance system in "The Missile"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blast
programme.desc: Henry Darrow guest stars as Gregory Tolan, the local leader of a revolutionist group specializing in robberies for the financing of a movement to overthrow the United States government in the "Blast"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: A Ghost Story
programme.desc: Andrew Duggan guest stars as Justin Bainbridge, a multimillionaire paranoid militarist, whose son, Howard, defected behind the Iron Curtain with the formula to a lethal nerve gas he had developed in "A Ghost Story"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Party
programme.desc: The whereabouts of a list of enemy agents operating in the United States are locked in the memory of a captured spy, Col. Vanin (guest star Frank Marth), and no one, including the spy, can penetrate his mind in "The Party"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blind
programme.desc: An F.B.I. man is blinded while investigating a crime syndicate attempting to take over a large chemical plant. Jim Phelps undergoes a delicate eye operation so as to appear convincingly blind when he poses as the sightless man.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encore
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as an aging hoodlum who is artificially transplanted back to the 1930s and the scene of his unsolved crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Tram
programme.desc: The leaders of two underworld factions call a top-level meeting at a ski resort to set up a financial holding company capable of creating chaos within the national economy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Mindbend
programme.desc: To help the IMF team break up a crime syndicate that specializes in brainwashing ex-convicts into committing political assassinations, Barney substitutes for a former prisoner looking for an operation to give himself a new appearance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Shape-Up
programme.desc: Guest stars Gerald S. O'Loughlin and Christopher Stone portray crime syndicate bosses in charge of the waterfront who extort huge sums of money from every ship docking at a west coast port.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Miracle
programme.desc: An undercover agent is murdered while trying to intercept a huge heroin shipment in the Pacific Northwest and the IMF team is called to take over and put the dealer and his chief executioner out of business.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encounter
programme.desc: Guest star Elizabeth Ashley plays the alcoholic wife of a crime syndicate leader whose involvement in an intimidation racket and the cold-blooded murder of an employee puts the IMF team on his trail.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underwater
programme.desc: Stolen gems worth seventy-five million dollars scheduled to be fenced to an underworld figure suddenly disappear and the ship on which they were being transported is blown up at sea bringing the IMF team into the picture.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Invasion
programme.desc: Guest star Kevin McCarthy plays the role of a highly-placed Defense Department advisor who has murdered an Air Force official and sold vital top-secret material about America's nuclear defenses to foreign powers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blues
programme.desc: Barney poses as a prospective rock-music recording artist to get evidence linking an organized crime figurehead played by guest star William Windom to the sudden death of a beautiful recording star who was being blackmailed by the syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Visitors
programme.desc: Guest star Steve Forrest plays the role of a millionaire publisher and communications tycoon who has sold fifty-one percent of his empire to an underworld crime syndicate which gives them a powerful influence over state politics.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nerves
programme.desc: Christopher George guest stars in the role of a psychotic ex-convict determined to wreak vengeance on society.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: En britisk student faller for en amerikansk student, bare for å bli skilt fra ham når hun blir utvist fra USA etter å ha overskredet oppholdstillatelsen sin.

programme.title: Roustabout
programme.desc: Elvis er en tøff motorsyklist som blir ansatt som tivoliets rostabout. Først sørger han bare for muskler og avveksling for de vakre tivolijentene. Så tar han opp en gitar og får tivoliet til å rocke.

programme.title: Tamara Drewe
programme.desc: Den unge journalisten Tamara Drewe vender tilbake til sine røtter på den engelske landsbygda for å selge sitt barndomshjem etter at hennes mor dør. Hennes ankomst skaper mildt sagt en hel del uro i byen.

programme.title: What If
programme.desc: Den håpløst romantiske Wallace har droppet ut av medisinstudiet og har brent seg på kjærligheten. Når han møter Chantry, som dessverre er i et forpliktende forhold til kjæresten Ben, oppstår en umiddelbar gnist mellom dem.

programme.title: Delirious
programme.desc: Les er kjendisfotograf og er avhengig av blinkskudd for å overleve. Toby Grace (Michael Pitt) er uteligger og avhengig av veldedighet for å overleve. En dag møtes disse to tilfeldig og et slags vennskap på godt og vondt utvikler seg dem imellom.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer spiller Frankie, en servitrise som jobber på en kaffebar i New York. Etter en rekke vonde forhold er en ny mann det siste Frankie ser etter... helt til en kommer og ser etter henne.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: Two lovers engage in a passionate but thwarted romance in this modern adaptation of the classic novel.

programme.title: Z for Zachariah
programme.desc: I etterkant av av en verdensomspennende atomkrig er Ann Burden (Margot Robbie) en overlevende. Ann frykter lenge at hun er det eneste gjenlevende mennesket på jorden, inntil hun oppdager noe helt forbløffende: et annen menneske.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: En singel kvinne med fokus på karrieren i New York blir tvunget til å forholde seg til følgene av et mislykket forhold når ekskjæresten hennes hyrer inn hennes reklamebyrå.

programme.title: About Adam
programme.desc: Når den bekymringsløse Lucy (Kate Hudson) endelig møter den perfekte mannen, Adam (Stuart Townsend), er hun klar til å slå seg til ro. Men mens Lucy planlegger bryllupet sitt, er Adam opptatt med å sjarmere resten av familien hennes!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Denton on Doomsday
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Once Upon a Time
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Two
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Dummy
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Time Enough at Last
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Five Characters in Search of an Exit
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.
programme.sub-title: Five Characters in Search of an Exit

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Elegy
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Come Wander with Me
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Where is Everybody?
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: From Agnes - With Love
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: You Drive
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Execution
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Uncle Simon
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Walking Distance
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Cavender is Coming
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Still Valley
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Midnight Sun
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What's in the Box
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Encounter
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trouble with Templeton
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Grave
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dust
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A World of Difference
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Stop at Willoughby
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Quality of Mercy
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Long Morrow
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Passage for Trumpet
programme.desc: A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Probe 7, Over and Out
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Am the Night - Color Me Black
programme.desc: On the day an unpopular idealist is to be executed for the killing of a racist bully, the townsfolk are shocked to see the skies have turned pitch black.
programme.sub-title: I Am the Night - Color Me Black

programme.title: The Uninvited
programme.desc: Basert på Kim Jee-Woons koreanske skrekkfilm fra 2003. Historien handler om to søstre som kommer hjem til faren etter å ha vært på mentalinstitusjon. Deres bedring er hindret av deres onde stemor.

programme.title: Scorpion: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: Før Halloween må teamet infiltrere et dypt, enormt hulesystem for å hindre en flaggermusbestand i å ødelegge det nordamerikanske økosystemet.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.title: Scorpion: Sly and the Family Stone
programme.desc: På valgdagen, når demokratiet står på spill, blir Team Scorpion kalt inn når noen prøver å skape kaos i det amerikanske presidentvalget.

programme.title: Scorpion: Mother Load
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion reiser til Irland for Megans ettårsjubileum, oppdager Walter at en naturkatastrofe i en innsjø i nærheten har skapt en giftig sky som kan drepe alle i landsbyen.

programme.title: Scorpion: This Is the Pits
programme.desc: Paiges mor verver Team Scorpion når hun ved et uhell oppdager en glemt atomreaktor i ferd med å eksplodere.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Walter må svømme gjennom de dødelige La Brea-tjæregropene mens teamet hjelper en kvinne som sitter fast i tjæren før hun går tom for oksygen.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Det er julaften og Team Scorpions elektronikkfrie ferie på fjellet blir dødelig når de støter på våpensmuglere og Ralph blir kidnappet mens de prøver å rømme.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: Når et oppdrag i ørkenen resulterer i eksploderende splinter som skader Cabe alvorlig, må Team Scorpion fryse kroppen for å redde livet hans.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion blir lurt til å produsere falske penger for en utenlandsk enhet som ønsker å ødelegge den amerikanske økonomien, må Paige stole på moren Veronicas ferdigheter som svindler for å redde dem.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Teamet må redde en mann på kanten av et enormt synkehull som truer med å ødelegge Los Angeles vannforsyning for alltid.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpions jobb med å finne sunkne skatter går galt når Walter og Paiges båt eksploderer, og etterlater dem fortapt midt i Stillehavet omgitt av haier.

programme.title: Scorpion: Keep It in Check, Mate
programme.desc: Walter og Sylvester deltar undercover i en internasjonal sjakkkturnering på fremmed jord for Team Scorpion for å ta ut en amerikansk spion før identiteten hennes avsløres.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
programme.desc: Når et enkelt oppdrag for å beskytte en viktig frøbank går galt, må Team Scorpion redde Happy, Sylvester og Cabe, som begynner å lide av livstruende, fryktbaserte hallusinasjoner.

programme.title: Scorpion: Don't Burst My Bubble
programme.desc: Etter en kraftig storm, sitter Happys venn Ada, som lever i en steril boble for å beskytte sitt kompromitterte immunsystem, igjen med farlig avfall i ferd med å punktere strukturen.

programme.title: Scorpion: Monkey See, Monkey Poo
programme.desc: For å stoppe et farlig virus fra å spre seg, må Team Scorpion finne en sjelden truet ape i Amazonas som har antistoffet for kuren.

programme.title: Scorpion: Broken Wind
programme.desc: Under et oppdrag for å reparere en turbin ved en vindpark, må Team Scorpion skynde seg for å redde Paige og Happy før kabelen som holder gondolen de er i, går i stykker.

programme.title: Scorpion: Rock Block
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må trosse ordre fra en utenlandsk regjering når de henter en asteroide fra verdensrommet som inneholder DNA-tråder som kan få dødelige konsekvenser hvis de blir utsatt for luft.

programme.title: Scorpion: Strife on Mars
programme.desc: Team Scorpion blir sittende fast i en kollapsende og farlig biodom beregnet på Mars mens de prøver å få et par forskere ut.

programme.title: Scorpion: Satellite of Love
programme.desc: Den nye direktøren for Homeland Security gjenforener teamet når en atomdrevet russisk satellitt blir slått ut av bane og må omdirigeres før den detonerer over Sør-California.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion drar til Cuba når en kvinne fra Cabes fortid ber ham om å hjelpe til med å fange en serbisk krigsforbryter.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fish Filet
programme.desc: For å redde livene til tre dommere går Sylvester undercover i et føderalt fengsel, men Team Scorpion må bryte ham ut når livet hans er i fare.

programme.title: Scorpion: Robots
programme.desc: Walter, Cabe og Happy er fanget sammen med mannskapet i en topphemmelig ubåt når en eksplosjon sender den til bunnen av havet med begrenset oksygen og en selvdestruksjonsfunksjon som snart vil aktiveres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Central Jutland
programme.desc: Volcanoes and glaciers shaped this part of the country, leaving a giant fjord and pre-historic fossils in their wake. Farmers and food innovators work closely with nature to prepare food with the area’s plentiful herbs and award-winning seafood.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Tareq goes back to Åland to explore more of this island territory. Tareq finds a chef setting up a huge food village, sees forts left over from various invaders over the centuries, and learns about beer being recreated from 200 year old DNA.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Tornedalen
programme.desc: There are not many places like Tornedalen. A rushing river has provided for locals for centuries, and the very fertile land has yielded amazing crops for centuries.Tareq explores the traditions and the food that are part of the short summer season.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Jutland
programme.desc: At the northern-most part of Denmark, you are always close to raw, beautiful nature, and incredible sunlight that has drawn artists here for over 100 years. Tareq visits a salt maker using medieval techniques and experiences the magic light of Skagen.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: East Denmark
programme.desc: East Denmark contains some of Denmark’s most fertile lands, and many traditional farmers are converting to organic production and winning awards for their cheeses and wine. Tareq bikes through an area of limestone cliffs and Viking ships.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kristianstad
programme.desc: Located in Sweden’s south, beautiful Kristianstad is a 400-year old town surrounded by the ocean, fertile farmland and protected wetlands to aid the environment. Tareq makes his own chocolate and learns all about the art of eel-fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Southwest Jutland
programme.desc: Tareq visits Sydvestjylland – a unique area in Denmark filled with endless contrasts. Many food innovators are using the surrounding environment to take old traditions and apply them to the 21st century.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Nynäshamn
programme.desc: Sunny Nynäshamn is a resort town close to Stockholm, but there is more here than the sea. Tareq meets a prize-winning chocolate maker using ingredients from her garden, visits a thriving local food market, and gets a lesson in how to smoke fish.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Røros
programme.desc: Born as a mining town in the 17th century, Røros is now a center for local and organic food producers. Tareq tries dairy products which Michelin-starred chefs swear by, goes skiing and sledding around Røros many hilly streets

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Vimmerby
programme.desc: Vimmerby is known as the birthplace of beloved author Astrid Lindgren. Tareq finds that the area is also well-regarded for its cuisine. From the children’s theme park to the friendly moose that roam the hills, Vimmerby has a lot to offer visitors.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Trysil
programme.desc: The mountains and snowfall in Trysil mean that the town has to be creative with food; Tareq learns how to make cheese in the traditional way, and goes skiing of course, and takes to the slopes to cook something as skiers pass by.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Värmland
programme.desc: Värmland is home to many of Sweden’s most famous authors and inventors. However, it is also a place with a rich food culture. Tareq gets his hands on a very rare bird to cook and also takes time out to float down a tranquil river on a wooden raft.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Fyn
programme.desc: Tareq visits Fyn, the fairy tale capital of the world. Famous as the birthplace of Hans Christian Andersen, Fyn is also known as the garden of Denmark. Here we explore stunning nature and world class cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höga Kusten
programme.desc: Created thousands of years ago, the High Coast in the northern part of Sweden is the highest coast in the world. Tareq sets out to sample one of the most extreme types of Swedish food, fermented herring.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Denmark
programme.desc: North Jutland has a rich culinary history. The unique conditions have created equally unique products. Tareq meets local food entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever changing environment and putting this region on the culinary map.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Uppsala
programme.desc: Uppsala is the city of knowledge: home to the oldest university in Scandinavia. It’s a wonderful agricultural area surrounded by fertile flatlands. Tareq discovers the historical treasures of Uppsala and its thriving culinary life.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Sealand
programme.desc: North Zealand has been a playground of the rich and famous since the fifteenth century. Tareq learns how this beautiful north eastern part of Denmark is the perfect place to go foraging for wild berries and herbs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åre
programme.desc: Sweden’s largest ski resort Åre is well known for its local ingredients, boasting the highest number of organic food producers per capita in Sweden. The fresh water and clean air create unique conditions for growing excellent food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Danish Lakelands
programme.desc: The Danish Lakelands produce some of the finest ingredients that you can find. Tareq has a go at an old cooking technique from New Zealand called Hangi - using heated rocks buried in a pit oven.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team work to track down a serial rapist who is using his position as a police officer to lure his victims.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team take down an inner-city meth lab, but it is Don's FBI instinct that leads to the arrest of a bystander who is discovered to have a greater scheme in the works.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don's old flame Robin Brooks returns to California to prosecute an incarcerated criminal, but when three witnesses involved in the case are murdered, Don and his team realize that the next victim may be Robin and must work to keep her safe.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team tracks a gang of military thieves after they kidnap family members of an ex-marine who is wanted for murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A mass poisoning at a cult compound leads the FBI team into a maze of old grudges and a complex murder plot.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a rap star, the team uncovers a conspiracy of embezzlement and bribery which may be connected to his death. Meanwhile, Charlie prepares to meet Amita's parents for the first time.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and Charlie find themselves in conflict over their differing beliefs as they investigate a case involving national security. Meanwhile, Megan faces a crisis of conscience and leaves the team, on the fourth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team hunt down the killers of two rock climbers in possession of a stolen diamond, while Charlie decides if he should get his FBI clearance reinstated and a new agent joins the team, on the fifth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team investigates a pattern of increased ATM kidnappings when a woman who was abducted and forced to withdraw random amounts of money from her ATM is murdered. Also, Charlie meets the man who will decide the fate of his FBI security clearance.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When eight people, including two police officers, are executed in a coffee shop, an LAPD detective gets the team on the case, and they uncover a trail of blackmail, romance and corruption. Also, McGowan's investigation of Charlie and Don deepens.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a passenger train collides with a freight train carrying toxic chemicals, Don, Charlie and the team begin to investigate if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team are called in to help a veteran FBI agent track down a con man who has eluded him for years. Also, Agent McGowan hands down his decision on Charlie's security clearance and Don's future with the FBI.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team hunts a crew stealing high-end goods from a shipping service and looks to an employee with savant-like abilities to lead them to those behind the scheme. Also, when one of Don's men is killed on duty, he questions his faith in the FBI.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While on a date, David catches a disappearing act at a magic show but quickly becomes involved in the performance when the magician really vanishes.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the death of a family friend is ruled an accident, Don and Charlie investigate, only to make a startling discovery.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The bombing of an influential charity's headquarters forces the team to sift through various rumors about the true reach of the organization's power.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a vigilante group goes after a known criminal mastermind, Charlie is forced to turn to his rival for help. Also, Don wrestles with his emotions towards embracing religion.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don looks toward his newly found religious beliefs to help him contend with an escaped criminal bent on revenge.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team has only four hours to stop a group of hijackers who take a bus full of Hollywood tourists hostage.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A feud between rival Chinese gangs leads to the kidnapping of an undercover agent and the re-appearance of the enigmatic Samuel Kraft.

programme.title: Number 17
programme.desc: En gjeng tyver samles i et trygt hus etter et ran, men en detektiv er på sporet deres.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: En eiendomsmegler blir feilaktig anklaget for drap og bestemmer seg for å bevise sin uskyld.

programme.title: Blackmail
programme.desc: Etter å ha drept en mann i selvforsvar, blir en ung kvinne utpresset av et vitne til drapet.
I en postapokalyptisk verden våkner en gruppe små, nummererte dukker til liv og kjemper for overlevelse mot maskinenes ondartede skapninger.

programme.title: When Worlds Collide
programme.desc: En astronom oppdager jordens snarlige undergang og setter igang en plan for å flytte til en ny planet med en liten gruppe overlevende.

programme.title: Cold War
programme.desc: En lidenskapelig kjærlighetshistorie mellom to personer med forskjellig bakgrunn og temperament, på tross av at de er en dårlig match klarer de ikke å gi slipp på hverandre.

programme.title: The Lodger: A Story of the London Fog
programme.desc: En huseier mistenker at den nye losjeren hennes er galningen som dreper kvinner i London.

programme.title: Wim Wenders Collection: Wings of Desire aka Der Himmel über Berlin
programme.desc: En høyt lovprist og prisbelønnet film, som blant annet fikk prisen for beste regi i Cannes i 1987. Damiel er en ensom engel som streifer omkring i Berlins krigsmerkede gater og trøster dødelige i nød.

programme.title: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Clark Gable spiller Jim Gannon, en hardbarket avismann som forakter journalistskolene, helt til han ser hvem som underviser.

programme.title: The War Of The Worlds
programme.desc: Gene Barry og Ann Robinson er blant menneskene som blir fascinert når en meteorlignende gjenstand faller ned ... men passasjerene er definitivt ikke vennligsinnede.

programme.title: Cheers: An American Family
programme.desc: Carlas eksmann kommer tilbake med sin nye brud og krever omsorgen for deres eldste sønn. Den normalt sprø Carla sjokkerer alle i baren når hun godtar forespørselen.

programme.title: Cheers: Diane's Allergy
programme.desc: Etter å ha flyttet inn hos Frasier, utvikler Diane en kronisk allergi og tror at hans elskede hund, Pavlov, er årsaken.

programme.title: Cheers: Peterson Crusoe
programme.desc: Norm bestemmer seg for å leve livet fullt ut når han får de medisinske prøveresultatene.

programme.title: Cheers: A Ditch in Time
programme.desc: I baren får Sams uskyldige flørt med en attraktiv kunde, Amanda, ham i trøbbel når han ikke skjønner at hun er medlem av Dianes terapigruppe.

programme.title: Cheers: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Carla vinner favør og beundring fra Frasiers anerkjente mentor.

programme.title: Cheers: The Heart Is a Lonely Snipehunter
programme.desc: Gutta gjennomfører en grusom spøk på Frasier mens de er på fisketur.
programme.sub-title: The Heart Is a Lonely Snipehunter

programme.title: Cheers: King of the Hill
programme.desc: Sam melder seg frivillig til å spille en veldedighetskamp mot Playboy Playmates.

programme.title: Cheers: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Sam kommer tilbake til skolen for å få vitnemålet sitt.

programme.title: Cheers: The Mail Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Norm setter Cliffs jobb i fare når han tar over jobben for én dag.

programme.title: Cheers: Bar Bet
programme.desc: Et gammelt veddemål tvinger Sam til å velge mellom å gifte seg eller miste Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers: Behind Every Great Man
programme.desc: En skarp journalist besøker Cheers, men mister interessen pga. Sams arroganse.

programme.title: Cheers: If Ever I Would Leave You
programme.desc: Nick kommer tilbake for å vinne Carlas kjærlighet på nytt når kona hans forlater ham.
programme.sub-title: If Ever I Would Leave You

programme.title: Cheers: The Executive's Executioner
programme.desc: Norm blir tvunget til en forfremmelse som tvinger ham å sparke noen ansatte.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Med mye angst bestemmer Diane seg for å forlate Cheers og reise til Europa med Frasier, som har blitt tilbudt en midlertidig stilling ved universitet i Bologna.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla ansetter en engelsk kvinne for å fylle Dianes plass mens hun er i Europa.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla tar hevn på en tidligere rektor som hun forakter.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: I den spennende sesongsfinalen frir Frasier til Diane mens de er i Europa, og ønsker å gifte seg dagen etter.

programme.title: Cheers: Birth, Death, Love and Rice
programme.desc: Frasier kommer tilbake til Cheers med nyheten om at Diane har gått i kloster.

programme.title: Cheers: Woody Goes Belly Up
programme.desc: Sam og Diane overrasker Woody med besøk av en gammel kjenning.

programme.title: Cheers: Someday My Prince Will Come
programme.desc: Diane finner en kåpe, og tror den mystiske eieren er mannen hun alltid har drømt om.

programme.title: Cheers: The Groom Wore Clearasil
programme.desc: Carlas 16-årige sønn vil gifte seg med kjæresten fra skoletiden.

programme.title: Cheers: Diane's Nightmare
programme.desc: Diane er overbevist om at den galne skuespilleren fra fortiden hennes er ute etter å ta henne.

programme.title: Cheers: I'll Gladly Pay You Tuesday
programme.desc: Sam prøver å dekke over sannheten når han mister Dianes uvurderlige bok.

programme.title: Cheers: 2 Good To Be 4 Reel
programme.desc: Gjengen på Cheers prøver å løfte humøret til Carla når hun legger ut en personlig annonse.

programme.title: Cheers: Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Norm ansetter en privat etterforsker for å finne ut om Vera har en affære.

programme.title: Cheers: From Beer To Eternity
programme.desc: Cheers-gjengen utfordrer en rivaliserende bar i en bowlingturnering.

programme.title: Cheers: The Bar Stoolie
programme.desc: Cliff får vite at farens hans lever et hemmelig liv.

programme.title: Cheers: Don Juan Is Hell
programme.desc: Sam er temaet i Dianes forskningsartikkel.

programme.title: Cheers: Fools And Their Money
programme.desc: Når Woody blir hekta på tipping, trør Sam inn for å få ham til å innse feilen.

programme.title: Cheers: Take My Shirt…Please
programme.desc: Sam innser at baseballdagene hans er over når ingen byr på trøya hans.

programme.title: Cheers: Suspicion
programme.desc: Diane stoler ikke på noen når hun er sikker på at hevnen kommer.

programme.title: Cheers: Triangle
programme.desc: Diane legger en plan for å redde Frasier.

programme.title: Cheers: Cliffie's Big Score
programme.desc: Cliff inviterer Diane og Carla til et årlig ball, og uventet sier de begge ja.

programme.title: Cheers: Second Time Around
programme.desc: Sam reagerer når Frasier vil gifte seg med den første jenta han dater etter Lilith.

programme.title: Cheers: Peterson Principle
programme.desc: Norm får et tips på jobben som kan garantere forfremmelse overfor konkurrentene.

programme.title: Cops: Blood and Scars, Bro!
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: Cops: My Jewelry's Fragile
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: Cops: Fast Food Escape
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: Cops: Late Night Snacks
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: Cops: Cops We Run the Show
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: Cops: Doggie Paddle
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: Cops: Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: Police investigate suspicious activity in a known drug area, officers encounter a jaywalker with the munchies, and a woman caught with meth wants points for honesty.

programme.title: Cops: You Didn't Get Very Far
programme.desc: A man complains of heart trouble after running from police, a suspect in a stolen car leads officers on a wild chase, and police check on a disabled vehicle and its occupants.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Not My Text Messages
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: Cops: Hands Off the Junk
programme.desc: The driver of a stolen car leads police on a winding chase, undercover officers run a prostitution sting, and a woman's domestic disturbance call leads to her own arrest.

programme.title: Cops: Dealt a Bad Hand
programme.desc: Suspects flee an overturned auto, a man is accused of battery with a chain leash, and an unlucky gambler is dealt another losing hand by police when he decides to drive drunk.

programme.title: Cops: Batter Up
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: Cops: Mohawked Cleaning Service
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: Cops: The Runaways
programme.desc: A driver pursued by police bails from her moving vehicle, a jaywalker decides to run from officers, and a patrol encounters a little boy who decided to run away from home.

programme.title: Cops: Perfume Takedown
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: Cops: Put Your Clothes Back On
programme.desc: A disoriented suspect would rather take a shower than comply with officers, a stolen vehicle sting nets a surprisingly young driver, and a traffic stop leads to a drug arrest.

programme.title: Cops: Tazed and Confused
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: Cops: Cruisin' the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: Cops: Step Away from the Cutlery
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: Cops: Love Bites
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: Cops: Running in Traffic
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: Cops: Taser Proof
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: Cops: You'll Shoot Your Eye Out
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: Cops: I'll Raise My Voice Right Back!
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.
programme.sub-title: I'll Raise My Voice Right Back!

programme.title: Cops: We Know Who You Are
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: Cops: Lady Bit My Finger
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: Cops: Familiar Faces
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: Cops: Facebook Fury
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: Cops: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: Cops: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops: The One Dollar Shoe
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops: Getting Funcky
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: Cops: Hit and Run
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: Cops: Be Careful What You Ask For
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.
programme.sub-title: Be Careful What You Ask For

programme.title: Cops: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops: Sittin' in the Dark
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: Cops: The Blame Game
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: Cops: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot en galakse med enestående action og eventyr når kaptein Jean-Luc Picard (Patrick Stewart) og hans Starship-mannskap kjempet mot en farlig motstander... Som har en overraskende kobling til Picard!

programme.title: Star Trek I: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: Når et uidentifisert romvesen ødelegger tre kraftfulle Klingon-kryssere, vender kaptein James T. Kirk (William Shatner) tilbake til det nylig ombyggede U.S.S. Enterprise(tm) for å ta kommandoen.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Françoise Desnoue Case
programme.desc: On the evening of August 30st 2013, in a small village of Bougrogne, Éric Desnoue, 52 years old, reports his wife missing to the police. Did Françoise Desnoue run away? Or did she reattempt to kill herself?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case
programme.desc: On April 3th 2003, Chantal Ternik, a 48 year old housewife, is discovered hanged in her house of Sanary-sur-Mer, in Var.
programme.sub-title: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Murder in Le Grand Bornand (Flactif case)
programme.desc: Xavier Flactif, his partner Graziella and their three children suddenly disappear. For several days, mystery reigns.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murder in Le Grand Bornand (Flactif case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy
programme.desc: On March 21th 1991, Pascale Escarfail, 19 years old, is discovered dead at her studio in the 14th arrondissement of Paris, she was raped then stabbed multiple times.
programme.sub-title: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Killer Cop (Tavernier Case)
programme.desc: Firefighters in Barbizieux, Charente, are called to a fire in a large house in the village. They arrive to find the lifeless body of the owner, Claude Tavernier, 83, lying in a large pool of blood.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Killer Cop (Tavernier Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school
programme.sub-title: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)
programme.desc: Marina Ciampi, 52, is found dead at her home in Marseille. The victim is naked on her bed, a plastic bag over her head. But no trace of a break-in is detected.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)
programme.desc: A damaged bike belonging to Karine Schaaff, 16, is found abandoned by the side of a road in Moselle.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair
programme.desc: On the night of April 16, 2013, Anaïs Guillaume, 21, mysteriously disappears in Fromy (Ardennes) after spending the evening at her companion's farm.
programme.sub-title: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)
programme.desc: On Sunday, April 29, 2007, the body of Jennifer Charron, 21-years old, was found burnt to a crisp in a forest near Royan. The young waitress, who had been missing for two days, was visibly beaten and tied up.
programme.sub-title: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Disappeared Of Nancy: The Julie Martin Affair
programme.desc: On June 30, 2014, in Nancy, the police are called to the home of Julie Martin, a 34-year-old nurse.
programme.sub-title: The Disappeared Of Nancy: The Julie Martin Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)
programme.desc: The lifeless, mutilated body of a woman is found in the Rambouillet Forest.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case
programme.desc: On September 12, 2013, Eric Mosser, a 45-year-old heating engineer, discovers his wife Isabelle lying in a pool of blood at their home in Illfurth, Alsace.
programme.sub-title: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murderous Lovers - Anne Bardot
programme.desc: The disturbing missing case in Paris of 4 years old.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)
programme.desc: On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had found her unconscious in the bathroom with a mysterious plastic bag next to her
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Jean-Jacques Le Page Case
programme.desc: On the morning of July 24th 2009, a fire erupts at house in Plougonvelin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 702
programme.desc: Jeanett bryster henger etter at hun har født to barn, og hun bestemmer seg for å ta et brystløft og implantater. Men operasjonen blir en skuffelse for Jeanett.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 801
programme.desc: For 25 år siden var Susanne involvert i en voldsom trafikkulykke som vansiret ansiktet hennes. Siden ulykken har hun vært gjennom mer enn ti operasjoner, men føler likevel at hun ser ut som et monster.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 611
programme.desc: Etter å ha ammet over en lenger periode får Pernille slappe bryster, og hun velger derfor å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men i dag er hun så lei seg over resultatet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 804
programme.desc: Allerede i en alder av 15 år bestemmer Caroline seg for at hun vil bruke sparepengene sine på nye bryster så snart hun fyller 18. Men høyre bryst begynte å henge, og brystene hennes ble ulike.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 206
programme.desc: Louise brukte familiens penger på en brystoperasjon som ble en traumatisk opplevelse for henne. Camilla er flau over brystvortene sine, og Jeanette lever i frykt for at implantatene er giftige.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter to svangerskap er Jeannette lei av strekkmerkene på magen. Lokalpolitiker Karina satt igjen med to bryster uten fylde, etter å ha ammet sine to barn.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 612
programme.desc: Etter et stort vekttap har 25 år gamle Michele fått en gastric bypass-operasjon, men resultatet er skuffende og Michele har hatt store problemer med livskvaliteten.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 602
programme.desc: Carina har fått fjernet hudkreft på nesen og fikk i 2012 gjort en rekonstruksjon med egen hud. I dag er hun så lei seg over nesen sin at hun ikke vil være med på familiebilder.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 704
programme.desc: Iben drømmer om å vinne kroppsfitness for nybegynnere, men hun føler at hennes bryster er i veien. Men uansett hvor mye hun jobber med kroppen sin, kan hun ikke trene brystene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 512
programme.desc: Nina jobber som danser, men føler seg veldig utilpass i jobben fordi det ene brystimplantatet hennes flytter på seg og kløften hennes er mindre pen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 806
programme.desc: Tinas mareritt startet i 2015, når hun får en svulst på nesen som fortsetter å vokse. Hun må gjennomgå strålebehandling for å få den fjernet, men svulsten etterlater et gap som må lukkes.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Vi møter Maja, som skammer seg så mye over silikonbrystene sine, at hun holder resultatet hemmelig for mannen sin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 204
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Melissa, som gikk i tilbudsfellen, og Dorte, som syns at magen hennes ser ut som en rumpe.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 312
programme.desc: Angelina har operert brystene 11 ganger, og fikk lagt inn implantater på 1500 mm - som sprakk. Maria mener at man kan operere alt man er misfornøyd med på kroppen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 803
programme.desc: Natasja har tidligere jobbet so, modell. I 2013 fikk hun implantatene i brystene sine fjernet, men operasjonen gikk ikke som planlagt og som et resultat har hun nå to forskjellige bryster

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: Vi møter perfeksjonisten Christina, som etter to keisersnitt har fått et stygt arr på magen, som hun forsøker å skjule.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 705
programme.desc: Som 21-åring drømmer Simone om runde og fyldige bryster. Hun gjør en brystforstørrende operasjon, men hun ender opp med betennelse og må gjøre flere reoperasjoner, før hun selv sier stopp til kirurgen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 905
programme.desc: Melanie og Monas operasjoner hindrer dem i å være intime med sine kjærester. Karinas bryster har et cottage cheese-lignende materiale som siver ut av brystvortene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 901
programme.desc: Melissa har gjennomført tre brystforstørrelsesoperasjoner, som gjør at hun må leve med store smerter og har blitt avhengig av morfin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Lenette har gått ned 55 kilo og føler at hun har for mye løs hud på magen, brystene og lårene. Hun finner derfor en kirurg, utfører alle de tre operasjonene, men det går ikke som planlagt.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.
