programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Remember Love
programme.desc: In a moment of profound despair, Vincent undergoes his own It's a Wonderful Life (1946) experience and sees what would have happened if he had died as a baby.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ashes, Ashes
programme.desc: A Russian sailor escapes to the tunnels only to bring a plague upon the people in the Underworld. It is up to Catherine, Vincent, Father, and everybody to help save their world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: When the tunnel world is having an annual event, Paracelcus makes plans to crash the event and do something.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: God Bless the Child
programme.desc: With Catherine's help, a pregnant teenage hooker is welcomed into the tunnels. Complications arise when she falls in love with Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: A deaf girl, who used to live below, falls in with a street gang that threatens to put an end to her first serious love affair.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Fair and Perfect Knight
programme.desc: Catherine befriends a boy from the world below who leaves the tunnels to go college.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Labyrinths
programme.desc: A young man gets lost in the tunnel world and he is found by the inhabitants. They're uncertain if they should let him go because they're not sure if he can be trusted to keep their secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Brothers
programme.desc: Vincent's "brother" Devin returns with Charles, a hideously deformed man seeking sanctuary.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Gentle Rain
programme.desc: Kanin, a resident of the Underworld, goes into a store on the surface and is recognized by a woman as the man who killed her son, years ago.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Outsiders"
programme.desc: When intruders penetrates their tunnel world, father decides to welcome them with gifts, but instead of gratitude, they are met with greed and violence. Things escalate to the point that tunnel dwellers have no other choice but to leave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Orphans
programme.desc: After her father dies, Catherine thinks about living the rest of her life in the world below.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Arabesque
programme.desc: Vincent's childhood sweetheart returns to the tunnels, and Vincent reveals a painful memory of her to Catherine.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: When the Blue Bird Sings
programme.desc: Catherine meets a persistent artist, who follows and spies on her. But this artist isn't all what he seems to be.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Watcher
programme.desc: On Vincent and Catherine's two year anniversary, Catherine receives a phone message indicating that someone is watching them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Distant Shore
programme.desc: Catherine heads out to L.A California, to find a witness for an investigation.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Trial
programme.desc: Catherine is put in charge of a murder case in court, and to bring justice to a five year old murdered son.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Kingdom by the Sea
programme.desc: Catherine is blocked out of an investigation involving a murder attempt by the C.I.A. But there are more shocks yet to come, and a familiar face returns.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Wunderkind
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck campaign manager (John Cho) is determined to get a kid (Jacob Tremblay) elected as the President of the United States. Allison Tolman and John Larroquette guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Six Degrees of Freedom
programme.desc: A space crew preparing for the first human flight to Mars is faced with a life-altering decision...and its consequences. DeWanda Wise, Jessica Williams, Jefferson White, Lucinda Dryzek and Jonathan Whitesell guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Gift
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Dummy
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Young Man's Fancy
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Sing the Body Electric
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Not All Men
programme.desc: A meteor shower spreads infection across an entire town... affecting some of the inhabitants more than others. Taissa Farmiga, Rhea Seehorn, Luke Kirby and Ike Barinholtz guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Point of Origin
programme.desc: A suburban housewife (Ginnifer Goodwin) wants to go home. But where - and what - is home, really? Zabryna Guevara and James Frain guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Cavender is Coming
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Changing of the Guard
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: In Praise Of Pip
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Steel
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Blue Scorpion
programme.desc: The emergence of the elusive Blue Scorpion leads anthropology professor Jeff Storck (Chris O'Dowd) to his most personal research project yet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Blurryman
programme.desc: Writer Sophie Gelson (Zazie Beetz) is haunted by a mysterious figure. Seth Rogen and Betty Gabriel guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare at 20,000 Feet
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Kind of a Stopwatch
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Night of a Jockey
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.
programme.sub-title: The Last Night of a Jockey

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Living Doll
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Meet in the Middle
programme.desc: Lonely bachelor Phil (Jimmi Simpson) finds meaningful human connection when he discovers a telepathic link to a stranger named Annie (Gillian Jacobs). Their connection quickly sparks a romance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Downtime
programme.desc: After a recent promotion to hotel manager, Michelle (Morena Baccarin) feels like she's on top of the world, but any cause for celebration is short lived when the nature of her reality is called into question. Colman Domingo and Tony Hale also guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Old Man in the Cave
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man in the Cave

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Uncle Simon
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Probe 7, Over and Out
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The 7th is Made Up of Phantoms
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.
programme.sub-title: The 7th is Made Up of Phantoms

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Who of You
programme.desc: Struggling actor Harry (Ethan Embry) risks everything to catch his big break, but an impulsive scheme takes a few turns no one saw coming. Daniel Sunjata and Billy Porter also guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ovation
programme.desc: The music career of struggling singer Jasmine takes off overnight after she witnesses a tragic incident. Jasmine begins receiving rapturous applause everywhere she goes, but she soon realizes the relentless recognition comes at a steep cost.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Finally!
programme.desc: Romance brews between Sabrina and Josh when they turn the coffeehouse into a single's night featuring entertainment by the band Eden's Crush.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Really Big Season Opener
programme.desc: Miles decides to make a student film in his favorite genre, horror, and enlists Sabrina as the producer of his film.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Date with Destiny
programme.desc: Sabrina and her friends return to school and a lot of excitement after summer break.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: What’s News?
programme.desc: Josh lands a job as a photojournalist for the Boston Citizen, and is surprised to learn that Sabrina is a fan of his new boss, Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Murder on the Halloween Express
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda are invited to attend a murder mystery party on the Halloween Mystery Train, which makes a stop in Boston.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Gift of Gab
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are thrilled to get their own show on the campus radio station, a two hour talk show they call "Chick Chat."

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Thin Ice
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a jam when ex-boyfriend Harvey requests that she use her magical powers to help him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hex, Lies, and No Videotape
programme.desc: Josh gets Sabrina an internship at the Boston Citizen where he works.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Humble Pie
programme.desc: Sabrina and her roommates discover that Morgan didn't pay her portion of the rent when the housing office sends a student to replace her in the house.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Birthday Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina receives an unexpected surprise on her birthday, a visit from her evil Aunt Irms, the matriarch of the Spellman family.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Deliver Us from Email
programme.desc: Intern Sabrina wants to propose writing her own column about the college experience to Boston Citizen editor Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cloud Ten
programme.desc: In an attempt to escape her problems, Sabrina decides to visit her childhood friend, Cathy Winter (Colleen Ann Fitzpatrick) in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Candidate
programme.desc: Sabrina is assigned to research the local city councilman election for an article, which will run in the Boston Citizen.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I Think I Love You
programme.desc: Sabrina's relationship with Josh couldn't be going better until Josh tells her that he loves her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Arrangement
programme.desc: Sabrina's devilish Aunt Irma returns for yet another unexpected visit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Zelda's boyfriend breaks up with her she cooks up a storm to drown her sorrows.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina gets an unexpected surprise when ex-boyfriend Derek stops by to say hello.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Competition
programme.desc: A friendly game of tennis turns into a battle of the sexes when Josh tells Sabrina that women are not as competitive as men.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I, Busybody
programme.desc: Always willing to help others with their problems, whether they ask for it or not, Sabrina finds herself in a heap of trouble when her advice goes awry.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Guilty
programme.desc: When Sabrina uses a little magic to get Zelda nominated for an award, she has no idea what she's started.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Whole Ball of Wax
programme.desc: When Sabrina gets an eerie feeling that she is being followed, she decides to take matters into her own hands but ends up face-to-face with her mother Diana.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Driving Mr. Goodman
programme.desc: Sabrina persuades Miles Goodman to get his driver's license and finds herself in the middle of a nasty lawsuit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I Fall to Pieces
programme.desc: When Hilda's boyfriend breaks up with her, she is devastated and claims that she is through with men.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Total Sabrina Live
programme.desc: Sabrina’s search for a job takes her to NYC and the Mtelevision studios.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Big Head
programme.desc: Sabrina has to write about an obnoxious pop star, who threatens to sue the magazine unless she apologises! Plus, Roxie and Morgan try to train Salem.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Call Me Crazy
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to impress her colleagues but accidentally says far too much about her magical life, making everyone think that she's totally crazy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Shift Happens
programme.desc: Sabrina is worried about having to interview a hip-hop star, but a spell to make them nicer backfires, and causes the pair to switch personalities.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Free Sabrina
programme.desc: Reporter Sabrina follows a story and almost lands herself in jail.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Unplugged
programme.desc: Sabrina encounters animated Shaggy and Scooby Doo inside Leonard's computer while trying to destroy proof of her powers.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witch Way Out
programme.desc: Sabrina meets a gallery owner (guest star Austin Peck) who already possesses a leprechaun (guest star Verne Troyer) and wants a witch to round out his collection.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Bada-Ping
programme.desc: Sabrina believes a musician (guest star Richard Voll) is being blackmailed by a gangster (guest star Garry Marshall); Avril Lavigne (guest starring as herself) performs. Emily Hart also guest stars.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: It's a Hot, Hot, Hot, Hot Christmas
programme.desc: The girls spend Christmas in Miami where Roxie runs into her ex-con mom.
programme.sub-title: It's a Hot, Hot, Hot, Hot Christmas

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Ping, Ping a Song
programme.desc: It’s fame versus friendship when the girls vie for a spot on a popular television talent show.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Lyin, the Witch, and the Wardrobe
programme.desc: Sabrina lands an interview with British pop star Daniel Bedingfield (guest starring as himself); Sabrina gets Morgan a gig as the wardrobe stylist for the photo shoot.
programme.sub-title: The Lyin, the Witch, and the Wardrobe

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: In Sabrina We Trust
programme.desc: The only way Sabrina can reverse a spell is to tell Roxie the truth about being a witch, and Salem induces Morgan to pamper him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina In Wonderland
programme.desc: Sabrina accidentally tumbles into Wonderland, where she meets the White Rabbit and the Queen of Hearts.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Present Perfect
programme.desc: The harder Sabrina tries to be perfect, the more mistakes she makes.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cirque Du Sabrina
programme.desc: Sabrina's bedroom is transformed into a circus, complete with a Russian Ringmaster sent to help her balance her out-of-control social life.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Getting to Nose You
programme.desc: Sabrina prevents Morgan from falling down an elevator shaft and incurs the wrath of the Fates, and Sabrina doubts Aaron's sincerity when he proposes to her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Romance Looming
programme.desc: Sabrina meets her future in-laws and almost loses her fiancé.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 4
programme.desc: Robert Lucas finds out his fiancee is keeping another man while he travels. Follow up with Desiree Gamez.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 5
programme.desc: Joey Cahill confronts his girlfriend and her supposed "buddy." Follow up with Maria Peace.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 6
programme.desc: Minerva Fernandez learns her boyfriend is leading a double life. Follow up with Doug Williams.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 7
programme.desc: David Henderick deals with an affair between his sweetheart and his best friend. Follow up with Marcie McRae.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jay Smart says goodbye. Follow up with Stephan Redlow.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 9
programme.desc: Lacy Dawson drops a would-be fiancee because of his two-faced behavior. Follow up with Matt Grisim.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 10
programme.desc: Isis Draper loses love to a member of her own family. Follow up with Jamal Smith.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 11
programme.desc: Chase McLendon finds that his girlfriend is more than a "kissing Cousin." Follow up with Teri Skipworth.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 12
programme.desc: Candace Jefferson lets her baby's father go his own way. Follow up with Ed Becker.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 13
programme.desc: Paige Davis finds her boyfriend half-dressed and tells him to get packing. Follow up with Stephanie Dye.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 14
programme.desc: Rose Harden ends her three-year relationship. Follow up with Emmett Croham.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 15
programme.desc: Maria Dominguez confronts her unfaithful husband at a haunted house. Follow up with Tammy Taylor.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 16
programme.desc: Antainette Dotson gets physical with her fiance and his new girl. Follow up with Evan Boykin.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 17
programme.desc: Nick finds his girlfriend's trainer is turning her on to more than fitness. Follow up with Freddy Ramirez.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 18
programme.desc: Delores Duran finds her fiance delaying marriage to date another woman. Follow up with Allen Williams.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 19
programme.desc: Daisy finds her boyfriend falling back into his old habits with an ex-girlfriend. Follow up with Allen Prince.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 20
programme.desc: Vanessa Shaw catches her husband of twenty years with a young woman. Follow up with Lionel Anthony.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 21
programme.desc: Wess Garron realizes his wedding will never happen due to his fiancee's lies. Follow up with Kristin Cone.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 22
programme.desc: Whitnee Stevens loses her high school sweetheart from his lack of care. Follow up with "ID Withheld."

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 23
programme.desc: Rashelle Reid finds her boyfriend in the dumpster after a heart-pounding chase. Follow up with Tracy George.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 24
programme.desc: Patricia Major views hard evidence of infidelity about her husband of ten years. Follow up with Tina Moffit.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 25
programme.desc: Christine Preston finds her husband seeking "professional" help from a dominatrix. Follow up with Leon Hester.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 26
programme.desc: Erica Laton is fooled by a married man. Follow up with Carrie Hartley.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 27
programme.desc: Kristin Walker's demeaning boyfriend paintballs the crew. Follow up with "Tiny" Stevenson.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 28
programme.desc: Demetria Morgan leaves the father of her unborn child. Follow up with Stephanie Burns.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 29
programme.desc: Amanda Greyson catches her boyfriend making content for an erotic website. Follow up with Ivy Hicks.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 30
programme.desc: Aaron Rodriguez fires his girlfriend for dating another employee. Follow up with Chris Hall.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 31
programme.desc: Melissa Godfrey separates with her husband of ten years. Follow up with Bruce Jones.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 32
programme.desc: Rose Porter decides between her baby and the father. Follow up with Brandon Musick.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 33
programme.desc: Kelli Manning unleashes her anger at her boyfriend. Follow up with LaTasha Johnson.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 34
programme.desc: Tamara Thomas puts her husband out of their house. Follow up with Chantal Womack.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 35
programme.desc: Christine Moss sees her fiance's lies with her own eyes. Follow up with Jonathan Falloon.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 36

programme.desc: David Lawrence seeks closure with his wife of twenty years. Follow up with Erich Dalrymple.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 38

programme.title: Fem i familien: Give Your Uncle A Kiss
programme.desc: Mallory is horrified and confused when a close family friend and older business associate of her father makes a pass at her.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Big Brother Is Watching
programme.desc: As the new editor of his school paper, Alex uncovers a cheating scandal and to everyone's chagrin, prints a list of students who were caught including Mallory.

programme.title: Fem i familien: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Sherry Baby
programme.desc: When popular sorority girl Sherry Marshall befriends Mallory to get close to Alex, Mallory brings them together in hopes of joining Pi Nu but her plan backfires.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fugitive, Part 1
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fugitive, Part 2
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Margin Of Error
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Fem i familien: French Lessons
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Fem i familien: I Gotta Be Ming
programme.desc: As Big Brother to a 10-year-old Vietnamese boy, Alex tries to mold Ming into his own image, and he learns an unforgettable lesson when he breaks a promise to the adoring child.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Stage Fright
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fifth Wheel
programme.desc: Alex gets stuck babysitting for his little sister Jennifer, who is fed up with feeling in the way at his poker game and decides to disappear.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Tender is the Knight
programme.desc: When pretty Carrie Newman and her mother Julia come to visit the Keatons, Carrie's forward behavior sends Alex into a panic.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Homecoming
programme.desc: When Mallory's boyfriend Jeff arrives home from college and wants to go steady, she's elated, but it's soon apparent that he's a little awed by the school and merely grasping at the familiar.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Alex anxiously awaits a crucial college recommendation from his English teacher.

programme.title: Fem i familien: To Snatch a Keith
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse realize how lucky they are when their friends come over for a visit, but are unaware that it will be for the last time.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Speed Trap
programme.desc: When Alex takes diet pills for a lift during midterms, his dependency level increases daily.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Batter Up
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse worry that Jennifer's softball team coach is pushing the girls too hard.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Not An Affair to Remember
programme.desc: Steven's assistant at the station is bright, talented, funny, and witty...and in love with him.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Working At It
programme.desc: Elyse feels the need to expand her horizons.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Sweet Lorraine
programme.desc: While working as a DJ at the school radio station, Alex strikes up a telephone friendship with caller Lorraine Ferrar.

programme.title: Fem i familien: This Year's Model
programme.desc: Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Birthday Boy
programme.desc: On his 18th birthday, Alex defies his mother and goes off with some of his buddies to celebrate at an out-of-town nightclub.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Diary of a Young Girl
programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Anniversary Waltz
programme.desc: For their 20th anniversary, Steven wants a small gathering, but Elyse wants a big party. Everything goes wrong, leading to constant arguing - with the kids worrying how things might end.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Go Tigers
programme.desc: Alex is both amazed and furious when a critical admissions interview at Princeton University is shattered by his hysterical sister Mallory.

programme.title: Fem i familien: A Keaton Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.title: Fem i familien: 'M' Is For the Many Things
programme.desc: Elyse is shocked by her soon-to-be-divorced mother's quick and free-spirited plunge into the singles world.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Say Uncle
programme.desc: Alex discovers that his idol, young Uncle Ned, has a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Ladies Man
programme.desc: Alex pretends to support the Equal Rights Amendment to impress a pretty feminist.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Lady Sings the Blues
programme.desc: Elyse is excited at the prospect of reviving her folk-singing career at a local nightclub.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Graduate
programme.desc: Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Double Date
programme.desc: Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG: To Russia With Love
programme.desc: With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG: Gypsy Eyes
programme.desc: Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: JAG: Act of Terror
programme.desc: When Arab terrorists attach a mine to a US Navy warship in an attempt to sink it, Marine guards are able to kill one and capture the other, even after the mine explodes, killing two sailors.

programme.title: JAG: The Black Jet
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: JAG: Silent Service
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are having trouble relating...a result of working together under stress for so long.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Greenie Board
programme.desc: Harm is now a Tomcat division commander aboard the carrier USS Patrick Henry that is patrolling the Mediterranean near Yugoslavia.

programme.title: JAG: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: The Russians are furious over the killing of their peacekeepers and the Navy sends Mac, Brumby, and Roberts to the Patrick Henry to conduct the court-martial of Lt. Buxton.

programme.title: JAG: True Calling
programme.desc: When a petty officer smuggles a pregnant Serbian woman aboard the carrier in order to save her from a vengeful fiancée, he's arrested and scheduled to be court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Psychic Warrior
programme.desc: When a Navy research project involving ESP and psychic phenomenon goes awry, resulting in the death of one of the research subjects, the Admiral in charge is court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Rogue
programme.desc: As the lowest-ranking lawyer at JAG, Bud is assigned to accompany Raglan, a former Special Forces operative who is hired by the Pentagon to test security at military bases.

programme.title: JAG: The Colonel's Wife
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Panama to investigate the possibility that the wife of the Marine officer in charge of interdicting drugs from Columbia was smuggling drugs into the US.

programme.title: JAG: Mishap
programme.desc: "Skates", Harm's RIO when he was aboard the USS Patrick Henry, was the Landing Safety Officer in charge of the deck when a Tomcat crashes while making an emergency landing.

programme.title: JAG: Into the Breach
programme.desc: Harm and Mac agree to help guide young student "attorneys" at Iron Forge Naval Academy, a prep school for the US Naval Academy, as they conduct a mock trial.

programme.title: JAG: Boomerang (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hostilities between Harm and Brumby escalate both in and out of the courtroom and it takes Chegwidden, with Brumby's CO's approval to get them to deal with their anger

programme.title: JAG: People V. Gunny
programme.desc: Gunny is charged with gay-bashing following an off duty altercation outside a gay bar.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "Accidental Cruise," the executive and his secretary come aboard a bit tipsy, are mistaken for another couple, and assigned the honeymoon suite.
programme.sub-title: Accidental Cruise / The Song Is Ended / A Time For Everything

programme.title: The Love Boat: Chubs / Locked Away / Till Death Do Us Part - Maybe
programme.desc: A ghost experiences jealousy as his mission to find his wife a new husband appears to be succeeding.
programme.sub-title: Chubs / Locked Away / Till Death Do Us Part - Maybe

programme.title: The Love Boat: Tony's Family / The Minister & The Stripper / Her Own Two Feet
programme.desc: Crew members make a valiant effort to keep six stowaways a secret from Capt. Stubing; a church member disapproves of her minister's new romance; a nearly-blind woman refuses to admit her problem until Doc intercedes. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Tony's Family / The Minister & The Stripper / Her Own Two Feet

programme.title: The Love Boat: Heads Or Tails / The Little People / Mona Of The Movies
programme.desc: Two passengers place a bet on who can win Julie's affections first. A son who loves his parents is shocked when he discovers his fiance doesn't.
programme.sub-title: Heads Or Tails / The Little People / Mona Of The Movies

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Folks From Home / The Captain's Cup / Legal Eagle
programme.desc: Doc must perform a risky operation after an accident; one of the ship's laborers is recruited to replace a missing dignitary; a bitterly divorced man has it in for his ex-wife's attorney. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: The Folks From Home / The Captain's Cup / Legal Eagle

programme.title: The Love Boat: El Kid / The Last Hundred Bucks / Isosceles Triangle
programme.desc: A beauty can't choose between Captain Stubing and Doc; a man and his wife return to the ship with an orphaned boy; a hospital executive falls for a seemingly successful businessman. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: El Kid / The Last Hundred Bucks / Isosceles Triangle

programme.title: The Love Boat: Julie Falls Hard / Double Wedding / The Dummies
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters decide to swap fiances; a separated ventriloquist team uses their dummies to rebuild their relationship; a handsome widower proposes to Julie, who has fallen in love with him and his teenage children. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Julie Falls Hard / Double Wedding / The Dummies

programme.title: The Love Boat: Second Time Around / The 'Now' Marriage / My Sister, Irene
programme.desc: Doc's ex-wife hires an actor - who takes his role a bit too seriously - as her fiance; a philandering marriage counselor's wife seeks solace from Captain Stubing; a woman pretends to be her own sister for a reunion with a long-ago sweetheart. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Second Time Around / The 'Now' Marriage / My Sister, Irene

programme.title: The Love Boat: Gopher's Opportunity / Home Sweet Home / The Switch
programme.desc: Gopher quits his job to manage a new hotel; a wealthy eccentric widow books a five-year passage and begins meddling in the crew members' lives; a magician tries to avoid his assistant by sending his brother to perform in his place. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Gopher's Opportunity / Home Sweet Home / The Switch

programme.title: The Love Boat: Like Father, Like Son / Don't Push Me / Second Chance
programme.desc: A father takes too much of a liking to his son's new girlfriend; a bachelor is terrified at the idea of marrying his gung-ho girlfriend; the crew gives a troubled teen a chance at rehabilitation. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Like Father, Like Son / Don't Push Me / Second Chance

programme.title: The Love Boat: Disco Baby / Alas, Poor Dwyer / After The War / Ticket To Ride / Itsy Bitsy - Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: Julie and former classmate Joey, a disco dancer, discover that they are still romantically attracted to each other to the consternation of his current girlfriend-partner Sherry.
programme.sub-title: Disco Baby / Alas, Poor Dwyer / After The War / Ticket To Ride / Itsy Bitsy - Parts 1 & 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: Dream Boat / Best Of Friends / Aftermath
programme.desc: Hans Conried offers Captain Stubing the command of a super-luxury liner; Doc meets his former mentor, now a disgruntled amputee, and his wife; old college friends are attracted to the same man. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Dream Boat / Best Of Friends / Aftermath

programme.title: The Love Boat: Tug Of War / A Good And Faithful Servant / The Secret Life Of Burl Smith / Designated Lover
programme.desc: Estelle Castlewood (Celeste Holm) begins to discover what a charming gentleman Bertram McDonald (Sir John Mills) is when she meets him as an equal aboard ship in "A Good and Faithful Servant."
programme.sub-title: Tug Of War / A Good And Faithful Servant / The Secret Life Of Burl Smith / Designated Lover

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Decision / Poor Little Rich Girl / Love Me, Love My Dog
programme.desc: A former waitress, who inherited a fortune, isn't sure if her boyfriend loves her or her money; a man is interested in a woman but her dog doesn't like him; Isaac falls for a woman who's engaged. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: The Decision / Poor Little Rich Girl / Love Me, Love My Dog

programme.title: The Love Boat: Funny Valentine / The Wallflower / A Home Is Not A Home
programme.desc: Two shy people keep missing each other, due in part to Gopher's interference; two residents of old folks home take a cruise, only to be followed by their meddling children.
programme.sub-title: Funny Valentine / The Wallflower / A Home Is Not A Home

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ages Of Man / Families / Bo 'N Sam
programme.desc: Julie ends up in the middle of an unusual love triangle when the visiting 13-year-old son of the head of the cruise line develops a crush on her at the same time that she is trying to win over a charming older passenger.
programme.sub-title: Ages Of Man / Families / Bo 'N Sam

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.
programme.sub-title: Not With My Sister You Don't

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Physical
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonsilectomy
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Cousin the Cheat
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: Happy Days: Nose is for News
programme.desc: To prove to his college journalism professor that he has what it takes to be a good investigative reporter, Richie gets down and dirty to expose who's behind an illegal garbage collection scheme.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Joanie's First Kiss
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: MacGyver: Split Decision
programme.desc: MacGyver helps his good friend Dent train for a boxing match and finds that he must rescue Dent's daughter from gamblers who have kidnapped her.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gunz 'N Boys
programme.desc: While working at the Challenger Club, MacGyver finds he must save the local gang kids from Minton, the local gun supplier, who is planning to kill all the gang members as well as letting Brian Jefferies take the wrap for a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: MacGyver: Off the Wall
programme.desc: MacGyver fights to save a housing project after tenants have been forced out of their homes by corrupt money-hungry landlords.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Mountain of Youth
programme.desc: MacGyver and his old friend Jack Dalton discover that inhabitants in a mountain valley live to be over 150 years old. Unfortunately, they also discover that it is the secret site of a heavy water plant used for nuclear weapon technology.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Stringer
programme.desc: When MacGyver becomes intertwined in a scheme to stop Chinese slave labor, he discovers that he has a son, Sam, who is also interested in bringing the fall of the man behind it all.

programme.desc: MacGyver is a modern-day American hero with the uncanny ability to resolve a crisis in an extremely limited amount of time.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gauntlet
programme.desc: MacGyver escapes from a carefully aimed bazooka shell

programme.title: MacGyver: Golden Triangle
programme.desc: MacGyver unwittingly invades an encampment in the Burmese jungle.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Thief Of Budapest
programme.desc: MacGyver flees from the Budapest police and the KGB while attempting to free a band of gypsy pickpockets imprisoned for stealing a watch containing top-secret information.

programme.title: MacGyver: Trumbo's World
programme.desc: MacGyver fights for his life in one of his most awesome adventures as he travels to the sweltering jungles of South America

programme.title: MacGyver: Last Stand
programme.desc: MacGyver is pressed to his unique escape methods after vicious robbers seize millions of dollars in an armored car and take him among their hostages

programme.title: MacGyver: The Heist
programme.desc: MacGyver unveils astonishing new tricks of his unusual trade to recover $60million in diamonds that were stolen by an unscrupulous and brilliant con artist.

programme.title: MacGyver: Hellfire
programme.desc: Rugged MacGyver plunges through poisonous gas, an exploding oil derrick and the hell of fire when he tries to help an old friend hit black gold.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Prodigal
programme.desc: MacGyver's skills are stretched to the limit in trying to keep an underworld figure from killing his own brother before the man can testify against him in court.

programme.title: MacGyver: Target MacGyver
programme.desc: When MacGyver is told to get out of town fast because assassins are after him, he has a bittersweet reunion with his grandfather who he hasn't seen in years.

programme.title: MacGyver: Death Lock
programme.desc: MacGyver plays a deadly game against a double agent who uses the world's most sophisticated electronic equipment in an attempt to silence MacGyver for good.

programme.title: MacGyver: Nightmares
programme.desc: MacGyver fights for his life as he struggles to recover a list of terrorists on pirated microfilm after he has been injected with a deadly serum.

programme.title: MacGyver: Countdown
programme.desc: MacGyver matches wits with a brilliant extortionist who has placed a bomb on a ship in a deadly plot to gain several million dollars.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Catering to more than twenty million truckers, truck stops are bigger and better than ever; these mega-pit stops are essential to the trucks and truckers that haul eight billion tons of freight annually.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Explore the world of extreme horsepower from fastest accelerating cars to massive hydroplane racing boats; discover horsepower's steam engine marketing origins, container ship diesel power, Hoover Dam water harnessing, and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: How superhighways move millions of people every year; 20-lane project in Houston; China's 28,000-mile National Trunk Highway System; High-Five interchange in Dallas; the anatomy of a traffic jam.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: They block the force of a river, produce enough electricity to power cities, move water over hundreds of miles and irrigate fertile valleys.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Limousines have been stretched to greater and greater lengths--as has the notion of what can be done inside them; you can have a rolling disco in a stretched SUV, go for a rumble off-road in a monster truck limousine, or take a direct hit.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Trucks transport a staggering 70 percent of all the nation's goods; looking at the amazingly diverse world of American trucks and the colorful men and women who drive them.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Big machines span NASA's world's biggest wind tunnel and flight simulator, Joy Mining's Continuous Miner underground machine, London Eye's 443-foot observation wheel, IMAX's largest film technology, and Claas Cougar world's biggest lawnmower.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Legendary drivers lead us on a record-breaking race through a century-long search for sheer acceleration that began before World War One, when hot-rodders modified Model-T Fords to see how fast they could go.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Giant robots work factory floors and outer space; floating fortresses house 6,000 military personnel with length matching Empire State Building's height; diesel engines produce 108,000 horsepower in audacious engineering feats worldwide.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Fast and powerful, they come in a hundred shapes and a thousand colors; to some, motorcycles symbolize freedom; to others, they simply stand for trouble; episode race back in time and see how, for over a hundred years, motorcycles inspired riders.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From the beginning of time humans worked to protect themselves against the very element that keeps them alive: water; the episode explores the fight against ferocious weather and floods with state-of-the-art roofing, wraps, tarps, boats and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From brutal winters to bug-infested summers, survival in the unforgiving landscape of Alaska requires an array of technological innovations and creative solutions.

programme.title: Kickin' It: Matt Turner
programme.desc: Kate Abdo, Clint Dempsey and Charlie Davies chat with United States National Team goalkeeper Matt Turner about the USMNT, playing in the Premier League, the highs and lows of life and much more!

programme.title: Kickin' It: Carli Lloyd, Part 1
programme.desc: United States soccer icon Carli Lloyd sits down with the Kickin' It crew to talk time with the national team, the ongoing fight for equality in women's sports, life off the pitch and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Kickin' It: Carli Lloyd, Part 2
programme.desc: The conversation continues with United States soccer icon Carli Lloyd!

programme.title: Kickin' It: Jozy Altidore
programme.desc: Jozy Altidore joins the Kickin' It crew to chat about his time on the United States National Team, family life with his wife and tennis champion Sloane Stephens, development of soccer in the United States and much more!

programme.title: Kickin' It: Landon Donovan, Part 1
programme.desc: This week's guest is American Soccer legend Landon Donovan! The icon joins the crew and looks back on his career, beef with Clint Dempsey, and much more.

programme.desc: The conversation continues with former USMNT Captain, Landon Donovan!

programme.title: Kickin' It: Thomas Rongen
programme.desc: Thomas Rongen joins the Kickin' It squad and chats about discovering Clint Dempsey and Charlie Davies, his experiences managing the U-20 team, and much more!

programme.desc: NWSL MVP, USWNT and Gotham FC star Midge Purce joins Kickin' It to chat career highlights so far, missing out on the World Cup, and more!

programme.title: Banana Joe
programme.desc: Bud Spencer er Banana Joe, en vennlig kjempe av en banandyrker som bor i en liten Søramerikansk by. Det går livet sin vante gang helt til et stort selskap vil ta over bananplantasjen og sette Joe i fengsel.

programme.title: Gud tilgir, ikke jeg
programme.desc: Terence Hill, i sin første hovedrolle, spiller det hurtigskytende engle ansiktet Cat, rett i hælene på desperate Bill og hans folk, som nettopp ranet et tog og drepte alle om bord. Hutch følger Cat når han finner ut at Cat kan føre ham til de kriminelle.

programme.title: The Troublemakers
programme.desc: Travis er vestens raskeste revolvermann. Hans bror Moses er stor som en bjørn, dobbelt så hissig og nybyggertraktens mest hardkokte prisjeger. Når deres kjære, gamle mor bestemmer seg for å gjenforene sine sønner til jul..

programme.title: Fem red ut!
programme.desc: Etter å ha vært i fengsel i 5 år, for en forbrytelse han ikke begikk, blir Bill Kiowa endelig løslatt. Han slutter seg til en gruppe bevæpnede menn for å jakte på en bølle ved navn El Fego, mannen som er ansvarlig..

programme.title: Den sorte pirat
programme.desc: Når de når en av piratenes arenaer, møter de tre andre pirater, inkludert Skull. En av dem selger ubevisst en verdifull og vakker fange fra sitt siste ran. Blackie kjøper henne, og deretter begynner kampen om lasten og den vakre fangen

programme.title: Skurker og banditter
programme.desc: Tony Roma er tidenes sleipeste gigolo, en skøyer som tar det meste på sparket, spesialisert på å rappe rike husmødres diamanter. Til slutt kobles den hemmelige politimannen Parker inn for endelig å få fakket gigoloen.

programme.title: Trinity - Djevelens høyre hånd
programme.desc: Han har en kjeft like veloljet som hans revolver. Han har et rykte like skittent som klærne han rir i. Han sier at han er en fredens mann. Hans navn er Trinity - Djevelens høyre hånd.

programme.title: Vestens hardeste neve
programme.desc: I en liten, nedslitt prærieby har Colorada Slim og ganden han overtatt kontrollen. Buddy og indianervennen Cocoa besøker byen, og dessverre for Slim og banden han forstyrrer de Buddy - mens han spiser. Og det kan gjøre Buddy sint - meget sint!

programme.title: Trinity slår til igjen
programme.desc: Verdens mest populære spaghetti-helter, Terence Hill og Bud Spencer, ender denne gangen opp som tapre redningsmenn - mot sin vilje.

programme.title: Jo mere vi er sammen
programme.desc: Løytnant Firpo har som hemmelig oppdrag å bekjempe et gambling-syndikat på USA's østkyst. Hans halvbror Charlie er en forhenværende gambler som kjenner alle knepe. Han går motvillig med på å hjelpe Johnny, og sammen renser de opp i Miamis underverden.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 419
programme.desc: Bachelor and Spinsters-ballet, fem timers kjøretur fra Gungellan, er en av de store sosiale begivenhetene for året. Jodi, Tess, Stevie og en motvillig Kate gjør seg klare til å dra av gårde.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 420
programme.desc: Stevies datter Rose dukker uventet opp på Drovers. Hun har stukket av fra moren sin for å bo sammen med tante Stevie.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 421
programme.desc: Endelig er det tid for Stevie og Alexs rodeo-skole, og de er glade for muligheten til å gjøre sine ferske studenter til rodeostjerner.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 422
programme.desc: En bilulykke bringer Stevie og Kane Morgan sammen for første gang. Stevie, blir sjarmert av denne kjekke fremmede, som forteller henne at hun ikke skal bekymre seg for skaden på bilen hans.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 423
programme.desc: Det er Tess' bursdag, og hun klager til Stevie at hun ikke har nådd noen av målene sine. Listen inkluderer å komme over flyskrekken, fikse forholdet til Nick og skaffe seg en økologisk sertifisering.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 424
programme.desc: Kanes forhold til Stevie og Alex belaster vennskapet. Hver og en konkurrerer om Kanes oppmerksomhet – Alex som kompis, Stevie som kjæreste – aner de ikke at Kane bruker dem begge til sitt eget formål.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 425
programme.desc: Det er dagen for veldedighetsløpet, og Tess planlegger noe så ukonvensjonelt som å fri til Nick. Hun legger en plan, men Dave får henne til å angre når han avslører at Nick har et forhold med Sally.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 426
programme.desc: Stevie er forelsket i Kane, men lykken blir kortvarig når hun får se et kjent ansikt. Vin Riley har kommet på jakt etter henne, eller nærmere bestemt opalene han mener er rettmessig hans.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 427
programme.desc: Mens Tess og Nick jobber med å sette opp en pumpe i demningen og legge bryllupsplaner, mister Tess forlovelsesringen.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 428
programme.desc: Når brannmannskapene i Gungellan blir kalt ut til bonden Barry Davies, får Jodi ta kontrollen. Han føler en misunnelse overfor forholdet mellom Luke og Ainsley, takler Jodi situasjonen godt.

programme.title: Grantchester: Episode 503
programme.desc: Will inviterer Ellie ut på kino. Der oppdager de at det har skjedd et brutalt drap i kinosalen.

programme.title: Grantchester: Episode 504
programme.desc: En naken student løper gjennom byen og roper «romvesenene kommer». Dagen etter blir han funnet død.

programme.title: Grantchester: Episode 505
programme.desc: Etter en boksekamp mellom Lucas og Matt blir døren låst. Vic og Will bryter seg inn og finner dem begge bevisstløse. Er det et dobbelt selvmord? Vic vet mer enn han forteller.

programme.title: Grantchester: Episode 506
programme.desc: Geordie og Will oppdager en død kvinne på golfbanen, med armene strukket ut som et kors og en giftering på fingeren.

programme.title: Grantchester: Episode 601
programme.desc: Prestefamilien og familien Keating har en etterlengtet sommerferie på Merries Holiday Camp, idet leirens eier blir funnet død under mistenkelige omstendigheter.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 429
programme.desc: Etter jordskjelv er kvegene urolige, og et underjordisk vannrør er blokkert på Drovers Run.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 430
programme.desc: Èn dag igjen til årtusenets bryllup på Drovers Run. Bryllupsforberedelser er en vakker ting, men den nært forestående ankomsten til Nicks mor, Liz, er ikke like positiv.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 501
programme.desc: Stevie og Kate vil vise hva de går for før Tess og Nicks kommer tilbake fra bryllupsreisen.

programme.title: McLeods døtre: Episode 502
programme.desc: Drover-jentene har problemer med å venne seg til Nick som den nye «mannen i huset». Dave gjør en karrieretruende feil.
