programme.title: South Park: Cartmans mor er en hore
programme.desc: Dr. Mephisto hjelper Cartman med å avsløre farens identitet, og alle mannlige innbyggere i South Park er aktuelle kandidater.

programme.title: South Park: Byen ved avgrunnens rand (tilbakeblikk)
programme.desc: Skolebussen krasjer i en snøstorm og blir stående på kanten av et stup.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Tamponger av cherokeehår
programme.desc: Kyle trenger nyretransplantasjon og Cartman er den perfekte donor, men setter en høy pris for nyren: 10 millioner dollar.

programme.title: South Park: Her kommer nabolaget
programme.desc: Token føler seg ensom fordi han er eneste rike barn i byen, og lokker andre velstående mennesker til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmtraileren
programme.desc: Alle barna i South Park er superspente på å se den første traileren for den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmen.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Jimmy og Timmy blir medlemmer av gjengen The Crips, som de tror er en klubb for funksjonshemmede.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Dum, bortskjemt hore-leketøy
programme.desc: Paris Hilton åpner butikk i South Park og forderver jentenes moral - bare Wendy holder fast på sine prinsipper.

programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: En million små fibre
programme.desc: Towelie skriver en bok som blir valgt ut til Oprahs bokklubb og blir en bestselger blant folk som vil overvinne avhengighet.

programme.title: South Park: Mysteriet med toeren på pissoaret
programme.desc: Cartman tror han vet hvem som står bak angrepene 11. september.

programme.title: South Park: Momben
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park forbereder seg til et besøk av Hillary Clinton. Cartman mistenker at en muslimsk elev er involvert i et mulig terroristangrep.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Britneys nye stil
programme.desc: Mediesirkuset kommer til South Park når Britney gjemmer seg i den avsidesliggende fjellbyen. Guttene prøver å hjelpe den plagede popstjernen.

programme.title: South Park: Kina-problemet
programme.desc: Cartman blir forskrekket over den storslåtte OL-seremonien og ber Butters om hjelp til å konfrontere kineserne. Samtidig blir Stan og Kyle vitne til 'voldtekten' av Indiana Jones.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Sexhjelpen
programme.desc: Kyle og Butters befinner seg midt blant Amerikas superkjendiser når de gjennomgår en behandling for sexavhengighet. Cartman og Stan er limt til Tiger Woods-kampen.

programme.title: South Park: Lattermaskinen
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt gjort narr av på The South Park Elementary Comedy Awards, bygger Germany en uovervinnerlig lattermaskin: Funnybot. Men dens planer for menneskeheten går likevel ikke altfor bra.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman finner kjærligheten
programme.desc: Cartman spiller matchmaker når en ny jente flytter til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Kravene heves
programme.desc: Cartman innrømmer endelig at han er feit og får umiddelbart en permobil.

programme.title: South Park: Hobbiten
programme.desc: Wendy prøver å pare en av sine venninner med Butters, men hun ender opp på kontoret til skolekuratoren.

programme.title: South Park: #Oppkok
programme.desc: Kyle vil bare spille tv-spill med lillebroren sin. Men da Ike vil ikke spille med ham mer, blir Kyle redd for at neste generasjon vil forbigå ham.

programme.title: South Park: Glade hologram
programme.desc: Cartman trender, mens resten av USA forbereder seg til det største juleprogrammet på tv noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Fabuløs og modig
programme.desc: Gutta viser Caitlyn Jenner sin enormt store respekt i det mest fabuløse og modige 'South Park'-avsnittet noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Trygt sted
programme.desc: Cartman er siste offer innen kroppsskam.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmans mor er en hore
programme.desc: Dr. Mephisto hjelper Cartman med å avsløre farens identitet, og alle mannlige innbyggere i South Park er aktuelle kandidater.

programme.title: South Park: Byen ved avgrunnens rand (tilbakeblikk)
programme.desc: Skolebussen krasjer i en snøstorm og blir stående på kanten av et stup.

programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Kristne rocker hardt
programme.desc: Cartman er fast bestemt på å få platinaplate med sitt nye kristne band Faith+1.

programme.title: South Park: Moro med kampsportvåpen
programme.desc: Guttene kjøper våpen på et loppemarked og blir forvandlet til japanske anime-krigere, med alvorlige konsekvenser for stakkars Butters.

programme.title: South Park: Dø, hippie, dø
programme.desc: Cartman blir arrestert for å fange hippier, men når South Park blir oversvømmet av hippier, vender de seg til ham og hans uvanlige metoder for hippiefjerning.

programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle står overfor sitt store gjennombrudd med Guitar Hero-ferdighetene sine. Manageren deres overbeviser Stan om at Kyle holder ham tilbake, og skaper spenninger mellom dem.

programme.title: South Park: Barneskolemusikal
programme.desc: Musikalfeberen når South Park, og guttene må spille med eller miste popularitet.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Tiss
programme.desc: Høyt urininnhold i svømmebassenget fører til en katastrofe som ødelegger guttas dag, særlig Kyles. Og Cartmans xenofobi får fritt utløp igjen.

programme.title: South Park: Broadway-brødrene
programme.desc: Når Randy forstår hemmeligheten bak musikaler, kan han ikke slutte med å ta med seg Sharon for å se dem. Andrew Lloyd-Webber og Elton John advarer ham mot å avsløre deres hemmelighet.

programme.title: South Park: Butter slår tilbake
programme.desc: Butters blir i hemmelighet plaget av sin bestemor og Stan ønsker å øke bevisstheten om farene ved mobbing. Stans idé er å spille inn en stor dansevideo, men suksessen raskt går til hodet på ham.

programme.title: South Park: Glutenfri ebola
programme.desc: South Park blir glutenfritt.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-CIS
programme.desc: Ifølge Eric Cartman har Wendy Testaburger blitt lesbisk.

programme.title: South Park: Du yelper ikke til
programme.desc: Cartman ser seg som den beste restaurantkritikeren på nettet i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Legg den fra deg
programme.desc: Nord-Korea sikter mot South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Hummel-figurer og heroin
programme.desc: Feirede underholdere faller fra i sine beste år på grunn av massive overdoser av opiater. Stan er i ferd med å bli avslørt som kilden til de illegale stoffene.

programme.title: South Park: Dobbeltrøbbel i Kina
programme.desc: Randy ser en mulighet for Tegridy i China.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Chefs salte sjokoladeboller
programme.desc: Chef får ikke solgt karamellene sine på en filmfestival, så han går over til salte sjokoladeballer og lager en reklamesang.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Verdens største blokkfløytekonsert
programme.desc: Klassen skal spille på en blokkfløytekonsert i Mr Garrisons hjemby i Arkansas, og forsøker å finne den mystiske 'brune lyden'.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy 2000
programme.desc: Guttene hermer etter Timmy, som har ADHD, for å slippe å gjøre lekser.

programme.title: South Park: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din
programme.desc: Guttene danner boybandet 'Fingerbang' og får spillejobb på kjøpesenteret.
programme.sub-title: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din

programme.title: South Park: Musikalen 'Hellen Keller!'
programme.desc: Guttene setter opp sin egen versjon av Helen Kellers historie for å overgå barnehagens forestilling.

programme.title: South Park: En stige til himmelen
programme.desc: Guttene bryter seg inn for å stjele urnen med Kennys aske.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Kristne rocker hardt

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan becomes involved in more than politics when he accepts an invitation to attend an election campaign party. A face in a crowd of well-wishers awakens old memories for Mayor Ridgeway's wife, Lauren, with murderous results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Always trying to help out a friend, Jack Stewart offers his support when a con-man acquaintance tries to straighten out his life. Instead, Jack's entwined in a mysterious fatal car accident investigation involving a posh health spa.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A tense situation erupts into a hotbed of chaos! While awaiting treatment from Dr. Sloan, convicted criminal John Dunbar unexpectedly jumps his guards and seizes a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A devastating earthquake causes widespread damage and Dr. Sloan's hospital goes on emergency power. After the tremors stop, Mark's friend Martin Garfield is found dead in the ruins of his mansion nearby. Was it the earthquake or murder?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve's undercover waterfront surveillance causes city-wide panic. His suspect, a gangland hit man, has suddenly developed the plague!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Posing as a visiting missionary, Dr. Sloan goes undercover at a convent to reveal the location and contents of a most mysterious package - a parcel that brought its owner to a sudden, untimely death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's double trouble for Dr. Sloan in this second season premiere. What could be worse than an IRS tax audit?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While confronting board members about embezzled charity funds, chairman Elton Malone mysteriously keels over dead. And, one by one, all of the suspects also wind up murdered--at each other's funerals!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Sloan's wealthy womanizing patient, Robert Stroud, mysteriously disappears, Sloan uncovers a greedy plot hatched by the women in Stroud's life. It's a murderous plan ripe with blackmail and betrayal--and a shockingly twisted conclusion!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Now you see it, now you don't. A despised lawyer turns up murdered at Community General and before the police can arrive, the body mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a tasty tale for the t.v. tabloids when Community General's most famous patient attractive t.v. star, Pamela, is caught on tape fleeing the murder scene of ex-husband number four.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a strange twist of fate when millionaire William Bissell, checks into the hospital and stumbles upon his ex-lover, Nurse Jenny Morgan. After Bissell's found murdered by lethal injection, Jenny becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As a favor to a colleague, Dr. Sloan agrees to perform surgery on mafia kingpin Alfred Johnson. A supposed routine heart operation turns into an untimely death for The Don.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dying of gunshot wounds, private investigator Charlie Harper whispers one final cryptic message to Dr. Sloan. Intrigued, Sloan searches for the meaning of the dying man's last words with the aid of Charlie's secretary, Georgia.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Kill 'em with laughter. That's just what Bonnie Valin did when she murdered her husband with nitrous oxide or laughing gas.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Kill 'em with laughter. That's just what Bonnie Valin did when she murdered her husband with nitrous oxide or laughing gas.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's sister Dora is moving to town. She needs a place to stay overnight while her new home is fumigated; however, they soon discover that more than just bugs have been exterminated.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: In a grueling fight that leaves both competitors hospitalized, undefeated boxing legend, Mercury The Heat Jones loses the world middleweight title to Tommy Brackett.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: A remorseful Caroline panics when she realizes that several hours have passed since she poured her heart out to Richard on his answering machine -- and she hasn't heard a response from him.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline realizes that the constant aching in her neck could be related to the stress she feels over her unresolved feelings toward Richard, but she doesn't let it get in the way of helping Richard navigate through troubled waters with Julia.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie is visited by her old singing teacher, Miss McGowan, Caroline helps Annie pretend to still have her “Cats” role, an act that may have a surprise ending.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: It’s a game of messy politics when Caroline will not endorse a local councilman, who is inspired by her comic strip, while Del conjures up a promotional campaign.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Discreetly planning to ease Caroline’s homesick holiday blues, Richard (Malcolm Gets) goes to great lengths to get a gift for Caroline that inspires suspicion in Julia (Sofia Milos) and sleuthing from Caroline and Annie.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Used Car Salesman

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Informed by Annie (Amy Pietz) of Caroline’s (LeaThompson) unspoken love for him, Richard (Malcolm Gets) confronts Caroline, who tells him that it’s a thing of the past.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Love That Dare Not Speak Its Name

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is tapped as a celebrity guest star for a quiz show, her jitters prompt Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help her study, much to Julia’s (Sofia Milos) chagrin.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to convince an insecure Del(Eric Lutes) that he has the potential to be a great parent after Del is shocked to discover that he is the father of a 10-year old girl.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Julia (Sofia Milos) tells Caroline (Lea Thompson) that it’s not easy being on the outside of her close working relationship with Richard (Malcolm Gets), Caroline quickly, and mysteriously, learns what it’s like to walk a mile in Julia’s shoes.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline (Lea Thompson) struggles with commitment issues over Trevor, Richard(Malcolm Gets) inadvertently causes a rift between Caroline and her new beau.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is insulted by a local cabbie, Adamo, she takes her case to higher powers at the travel commission. Meanwhile, Richard, frustrated by a “painter’s block,” becomes obsessed with computers when he joins a cyber cafe.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline’s (Lea Thompson)mother, Margaret Duffy (guest star Edie McClurg, “The Hogan Family”), visits Caroline for a mother-daughter People magazine shoot, tensions rise over unexpressed feelings.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Visit From The Mom

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) must hire a new cartoon colorist when Richard (Malcolm Gets) finally quits after he and Julia (Sofia Milos) move into their glamorous new home.
programme.sub-title: Caroline and the Marriage Counselor, Pt. 1

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: The fourth-season opener finds Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) savoring their first passionate kiss and preparing for romance.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Guys In The Bathroom

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Vengeful father-in-law Mr. Mazzone strips Richard (Malcolm Gets) of all his worldly possessions, forcing Richard to take temporary refuge in Caroline's (Lea Thompson) new office, where he runs afoul of Plum, the no-nonsense office manager.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Caroline (Lea Thompson) inadvertently offends office manager Plum (guest star Nancy Lenehan, "Grace Under Fire"), she and Richard (Malcolm Gets) are banished to a damp, dark basement office.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Annie (Amy Pietz) loses her boyfriend, her job and her agent, she impulsively accepts a date with her local drycleaner, Gil (guest star Ken Campbell),and spends an evening to remember.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) decide to go out on their first official "date" together on Halloween, but their romantic evening turns into fright night when Richard gets himself into a rooftop jam.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline stumbles across Richard's (Malcolm Gets) divorce papers in his desk drawer, but an office mishap sends her on a frantic paper chase to retrieve the documents after they are lost in the interoffice mail.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Tired of losing acting roles to other, more well-endowed women, Annie (Amy Pietz) surprises the gang on Thanksgiving Day by announcing that she plans to get breast implants.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard gets an offer that his empty bank account can't refuse: his Aunt Frieda promises to give him $5,000 as a Bar Mitzvah gift if he agrees to finally go through the ceremony.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard (Malcolm Gets) agrees to let Reg become a houseguest after the cartoonist has a fight with his girlfriend, Wanda.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Big Bad Bed

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del (Eric Lutes) experience mixed results when they become office mentors to a young cartoonist with an overactive libido and an eager marketing student.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to take Charlie (guest star Andy Lauer) under her wing and teach him the fundamentals of life after Del (Eric Lutes) is forced to fire the hapless in-line skater from his job at the greeting card company.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to right an old wrong by giving up a romantic weekend in Boston with Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help out a visiting childhood chum, Joanie (guest star Kelly Coffield), whom Caroline once bullied in school.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And Joanie And The Stick

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and the gang visit Caroline's family home in Pestigo, Wisconsin, but the homecoming is ruined when her parents tell Caroline that they are selling the house.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) gives Richard(Malcolm Gets) a 7 p.m. deadline to make a marital commitment to her, then is coerced into spending the day making pottery with Del (Eric Lutes) and Annie (Amy Pietz) while she anxiously awaits his decision.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After deciding they can't wait to get married, Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) plan their nuptials for the following week.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline and Richard (Malcolm Gets) prepare to leave for Italy to visit his newborn son, Richard makes a confession that gives Caroline second thoughts about their future together.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline Duffy (Lea Thompson) has her professional life just theway she wants it. "Caroline in the City," the comic strip she created, turned intomerchandising gold with an array of greeting cards, books and calendars.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Del are moments away from departing for a weekend trip to Atlantic City when Richard bursts into the apartment with news that he has been mugged.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Annie scheme to get Richard's paintings displayed in a prestigious gallery, and he's thrilled when their efforts earn him the recognition of gallery owner Kenneth Arabian.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Gay Art Show

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del(Eric Lutes) get carried away competing on the racquetball court, Caroline injures her back and ends up confined to bed.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline gets stiffed at her ATM, she meets with bank personnel to retrieve her money. However, because the surveillance camera captured her in an awkward moment, she's too embarrassed to let the bank manager view the tape of her transaction.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Del agree to go to dinner with Annie and Warren, her new boyfriend, they find that Annie left out one minor detail about his background --Warren's an ex-convict with a burglary record.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex
programme.sub-title: The Lighter Side Of Angela Matusa

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie's mother announces her plans to remarry, the panicked dispatcher threatens to sever all ties with her unless she cancels the marriage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: South Park: Skogsdyrenes jul
programme.desc: Julenissen må drepe alle onde dyr i South Park og redde verden etter at Stan narres til å hjelpe dem med fødselen til frelseren deres.

programme.title: South Park: South Parks fantastiske påskespesial
programme.desc: Stan vil finne opprinnelsen til malte påskeegg og oppdager en hemmelighet om den katolske kirken.

programme.title: South Park: Thanksgiving på History Channel
programme.desc: Når gutta prøver å lære seg alt om Thanksgiving fra historiekanalen på TV, blir de fanget i et mysterium som involverer utenomjordiske, Natalie Portman og kalkunfyll!

programme.title: South Park: Black Friday
programme.desc: Gutta forbereder seg på å slåss mot andre kunder på første dag i julehandelen.

programme.title: South Park: Gjennom ræv og ild
programme.desc: 'Svartefredag' nærmer seg og kampen om spillkonsollene blir mer intens - og siden prinsessen Kenny svek Cartman, er han ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Pupper og drager
programme.desc: Dørene til kjøpesenteret skal endelig åpnes for det største 'Svartefredagsalget' i historien. Gutta er uenige om hvilket spillutstyr de skal kjøpe, og et blodig slag vil avgjøre om Xbox eller Sony blir vinneren.

programme.title: South Park: Glade hologram
programme.desc: Cartman trender, mens resten av USA forbereder seg til det største juleprogrammet på tv noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Bæsjeproblemer
programme.desc: Mr Hankeys støtende oppførsel får ham nesten avskjediget som leder for det årlige julespillet. Samtidig blir South Park grunnskoles Strong Woman og rektor PKs forhold utfordret på helt nye måter.

programme.title: South Park: Sykkelparaden
programme.desc: Guttenes vinnersjanse i sykkelparaden settes på spill når Kenny trekker seg.

programme.title: South Park: Julesnø
programme.desc: Julenissen dreper all glede under julefeiringen i byen.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin
programme.desc: I en reklamepause under 'Terrance and Phillip' bestemmer guttene seg for å adoptere et etiopisk barn for å få en gratis klokke.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: God jul, Charlie Manson!
programme.desc: Onkel Howard rømmer fra fengsel sammen med Charlie Manson, som er klar til å nyte friheten, men blir distrahert av et juleprogram.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin i verdensrommet
programme.desc: Marvin er tilbake! Han og guttene reiser verden rundt for å finne mat, med CIA og Sally Struthers hakk i hæl.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankeys juleklassikere
programme.desc: Denne spesialepisoden har numre fra Mr. Hankey's Christmas Collection Album.

programme.title: South Park: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus
programme.desc: Alle guttene blir sjalu da Cartman påstår at han har kommet i puberteten. Jesus lover South Parks innbyggere en spektakulær nyttårsfeiring.
programme.sub-title: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus

programme.title: South Park: Musikalen 'Hellen Keller!'
programme.desc: Guttene setter opp sin egen versjon av Helen Kellers historie for å overgå barnehagens forestilling.

programme.title: South Park: En svært elendig jul
programme.desc: Kyle og Ike venter i spenning på Mr. Hankey. Når han ikke kommer, innkaller Kyle de andre til krisemøte.

programme.title: South Park: Rød slede nedskutt
programme.desc: Med julenissens, herr Hankeys og Jesus sin hjelp, forsøker Cartman å bringe julen til Iraks underkuete befolkning.

programme.title: South Park: Det er jul i Kanada
programme.desc: Kyles adoptivbror Ike blir hentet av sine biologiske foreldre fordi den kanadiske statsministeren har bestemt at alle bortadopterte kanadiske barn må returnere til landet.

programme.title: South Park: Skogsdyrenes jul

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: International Pairs Week II: Finals Night.
programme.sub-title: International Pairs Week II: Finals Night

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Simon Whitlock joins Paul Nicholson on Tungsten Talk to delve into memorable moments on the darts circuit.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Scott Mitchell joins Henry Deacon on Tungsten Talk to discuss the roles of brands and identity in darts.

programme.title: Break of Throw: University Darts
programme.desc: Keegan Brown analyses the throws of university darts players Adam Warner and James Buckby.

programme.title: Bullseye Only Challenge: Match Edition
programme.desc: Dart døgnet rundt! Her hos oss viser vi direkte ukelige turneringer, seks dager i uken og 50 uker i året. I tillegg sender vi nyheter, ulike reportasjer og intervjuer med de største navnene og personlighetene både forran og bak ochen!

programme.title: Break of Throw: Phil Taylor and Luke Humphries
programme.desc: Devon Petersen breaks down the throws of two masterful darts icons, Phil Taylor and Luke Humphries.

programme.title: Fallon Sherrock Opens Up
programme.desc: Fallon Sherrock joins Henry Deacon to discuss her MBE, media attention, and the future of women's darts.

programme.title: The Big Trebles and Doubles Challenge
programme.desc: Darts stars face a tough challenge with giant Doubles and Trebles! Featuring Andy Hamilton & Trina Gulliver.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Asian Players
programme.desc: Scott Mitchell dissects the throws and key differences of Asian Super Series players incl. Muramatsu & Goto.

programme.title: Champions Talk
programme.desc: Petersen discusses the impact of becoming ADC Global Champion and how the competition elevates amateur darts.
programme.sub-title: Devon Petersen on the ADC Global Championship

programme.title: Murph Meets
programme.desc: Chris Murphy meets Bobby George, the King of Bling, at George Hall to uncover the man behind the darts legend.

programme.title: Angry Ginge Vs The Bullseye Challenge
programme.desc: Angry Ginge Vs The Bullseye Challenge - featuring AwayDays, ThisIsFG and more!

programme.title: Break of Throw: Spotting and Counting
programme.desc: Owen Binks explains spotting and counting, guided by players' complex preferred routes and throwing styles.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Henry Deacon talks with the youngest ever Super Series player Archie Self, making waves since Luke Littler.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Taylor on Littler
programme.desc: Phil Taylor breaks down Littler's throw, revealing the secrets behind the young World Champion's technique.

programme.title: The Upside Down Darts Challenge
programme.desc: Simon Whitlock, Andy Hamilton and more take on the tricky Upside Down Darts Challenge!

programme.title: The Biggest Moments In Darts
programme.desc: Henry Deacon and Matthew Edgar discuss the most unforgettable and pivotal moments in darts history!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Music City Kjøttboller
programme.desc: Kjøttbollene overtar Nashville via kryss og tvang. The Situation spiser for mye. Samboerne lurer på hvordan Angelinas ankomst påvirker reisens energi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ronnie og Sam
programme.desc: Spenningen stiger mellom Angelina og Sammi. Ronnies lenge imøtesette ankomst slår følelsgnister fra samboerne da de treffes i Nashville.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jerseys varm kylling-utfordring
programme.desc: Gjenforeningen mellom Ronnie og Sammi blir kjempeklein. Paulys vil bryte spenningen og får samboerne til å spise varm kylling. Vinny spiser varm mat.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Er du venner med henne?
programme.desc: Deena er i bakgrunnen med turplanleggingen da gjengen planlegger familieferie til Tucson. Etterpå deltar Sammi i en a viral TikTok.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jersey Shore fanklubb
programme.desc: Tucson-oppholdet blir verre da en Jersey Shore-fanklubb lekker Angelinas DM. Tingene tilspisser seg mellom Angelina og Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ronnie, Sammi og Justin
programme.desc: Mike tar en nødsamtale til Thomaste da feiden mellom Sammi og Angelina begynner å koke. Ronnie drar til Tucson for nok en familieferie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: OG-kvelden
programme.desc: Gjengen tar oss tilbake til 2009. Pauly planlegger et puss. Mike vil skrive en beskjed.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gratulerer med dagen, Snooki!
programme.desc: Turen er i ferd med å avsluttes da RSVP rider innn i det gamle Tucson for å legge an på noen cowboyer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Strandkompisene er tilbake for å avholde Sammi og Rons lenge etterlengtede gjenforening. Mike tar nok en bit av Nashvilles hete kylling, og vi finner ut om våpenhvilen mellom Angelina og Sammi stadig gjelder i første del av gjenforeningsspesialen..

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Strandkompisene flesker til. Nicoles tidlige utgivelse og Nashville hot chicken krever nok et offer. Samt et legandarisk Jersey Shore-øyeblikk får en spagettiwestern-vri. Finn ut i andre del av Jersey Shores familiegjenforening!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Sammi tar et stort skritt. Vinny åpner seg om psykiske problemer. Nicole leter etter svar. Angelina og Mike fører ekstra feider til kjøttbollefesten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Hvem vinner første pris i den årlige kjøttbollekonkurransen? Gjengen er invitert til Las Vegas for 'det store spillet', og å være i Paulys 'nye' hus.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jwoww tok helt av, og kjøttbollene forberedte seg for åpnebaringen den første utekvelden i Las Vegas. Samtidig renset Angelina og 2.0 luften i Jersey.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Guido fikser verken bunkeren eller sannheten om at det store spillet faktisk ikke kan være det.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Snooki gjør store fremskritt i å finne sine biologiske foreldre. Paulys 'store spill' er endelig her.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Det spraker fortsatt mellom Angelina og Nicole.når Las Vegas-turnèen nesten er over, Klarer gjengen seg uskadd ut av Vegas?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni åpner seg som aldri før. Mike og Lauren er på nære nippet. Mens krangelen mellom Angelina og Nicole vokser, er tiden inne for en fredsfest.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: JWOWWs fredsfest går ikke som planlagt. Pauly lærer Nikki forskjellen mellom rigatoni og linguini. Mike planlegger den neste famileutflukten når babyen nesten har kommet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Mike og Lauren får sitt tredje barn. Sammi fortsetter prøverørsreisen. Og resten av gjengen inntar 'The Big Apple' i en dobbeltdekker med Vinnys standup-forestilling som endestopp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Slutt på pizzaen
programme.desc: Familien drar tilbake for å gratulere den nybakte trebarnsfaren. Angelina kjører direkte i sosiale medier. Sammi er klar for en våt overraskelse.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: A new school year finds Simon, Matt, and Lucy living the single life again.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary treads on shaky ground when she loses her job and gets caught in a lie.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Each member of the Camden household is either the victim or the perpetrator of the classic Friday night stand up.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy discovers the boy she wants to kiss spent time in a mental hospital.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary's new friends at work could be turning her toward substance abuse.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt, Simon and Lucy try to save Mary from ruthless debt collectors.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary is sent to live with her grandfather in Buffalo against her will.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The Camdens are torn apart by harsh rumors after Mary's departure to Buffalo.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon's new friends target Lucy and Annie as victims of their harassment.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The Camden clan thinks Eric has lost it when he opens the home to Mary's ex- boyfriend.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Robbie is such a good house guest that Annie and Matt feel underappreciated.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary sneaks back to Glenoak and Eric is right on her tail.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy gets jealous when her new love interest asks her to set him up with another girl.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy's first date turns out to be an ex-boyfriend reunion.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: No one thinks Simon will do the right thing when he finds himself alone with an attractive, older girl.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric fears that Robbie's estranged father will destroy his future.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt fears a therapist will reveal his inability to succeed as a doctor.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Robbie spends time with a girl that looks identical to Mary.

programme.title: Armor of God 2: Operation Condor
programme.desc: Eventyreren i Jackie Chans skikkelse er tilbake i en ny jakt etter en bortgjemt skatt, skjult i ørkenen av nazistene før andre verdenskrig. Men Jackie og kompanjongen hans Ada er ikke de eneste som leter etter skatten...

programme.title: Half a Loaf of Kung Fu
programme.desc: Jackie Chan spiller den unge klønete Jiang. Jiang vokste opp uten foreldre og til tross for at han verken har et akademisk hode eller de kampsportferdighetene han gjerne skulle hatt, klarer han å lure seg til steder og berømmelse han bare kunne drømme om.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America
programme.desc: I en tid da mange kinesere ble solgt til amerikanske jernbaneselskaper som behandlet dem brutalt med tøffe arbeidsforhold, reiser Wong Fei-hung til Amerika. Men etter et bakholdsangrep blir han adskilt fra de andre han reiser med.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze NO
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: The Young Master
programme.desc: Etter at Dragon har blitt bedratt av sin egen bror, Tiger, står de to som representanter for rivaliserende skoler i den årlige løvedansekonkurransen. Selv om Tiger vinner, blir han tvunget til eksil av skammen over å ha sveket sine egne.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars NO
programme.desc: Politimannen Muscle fra Hong Kong drar til Japan på jakt etter en korrupt kollega. Men siden yakuzaen allerede har opplysninger om ham, kan han ikke gjøre jobben på egen hånd. Etter hvert kaller de inn barndomsvennene til Muscle for å hjelpe til.

programme.title: Winners and Sinners
programme.desc: Fem gode venner blir løslatt fra fengsel, fast bestemt på å leve lovlydige liv fra nå av. Sammen starter de et rengjøringsfirma, og starten på deres nye liv er et faktum. Men samme dag løslates også en sjette fange som har en motsatt plan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donatello, Rafael, Michelangelo og Leonardo er muterte, grønne ninja-skilpadder som elsker pizza og lever under New Yorks gateplan. Derifra tar de opp kampen mot den ondskapsfulle forbryteren Shredder og hans armé av svartkledde krigere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze NO
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An enraged and irascible Dr. John Becker (Ted Danson) enters the diner in his typical bad mood and sends the patrons fleeing.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is bombarded by sexual overtones throughout the day, beginning with a sensual dream that is interrupted by a neighbor's blaring music.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the diner to find Reggie and Jake discussing their plans to take a sculpting class.
programme.sub-title: Take These Pills And Shove' Em

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: While Becker is at the diner with Jake and Reggie, an odd little man named Bob enters.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: While railing on the evils of Beanie Babies, Becker gets annoyed when an overly friendly delivery guy named Todd stops by the diner.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker throws his back out at home while trying to close a stuck window.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a fear that midgets bring him bad luck and is spooked by the new water guy, who happens to be vertically challenged.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker promises a friend that he will write a medical article for him, but gets frustrated with numerous distractions.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker learns that an elderly patient, Mr. Fowler, has suffered from a heart attack and calls his daughter to tell her the bad news.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker yells at a woman for letting her child cry uncontrollably, then rants about her bad parenting skills.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is outraged as he tells the gang at the diner that someone broke into his apartment and stole his computer.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts off the day in a cranky mood when he finds a stray cat in his office, which apparently crawled through a broken window.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the office carrying the parking meter that ate his quarter.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker's patient, Jimmy, is a penniless scalper who is unable to afford his ulcer treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: On Jake's way out to meet his girlfriend, Becker warns him that his zipper is down.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker (Ted Danson) performs his doctorly duties at the diner when a woman begins to choke on her food.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to quit smoking and ends up exchanging one urge for another, sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda gets a Little Sister and learns a lesson about rebellion while John meddles in Reggies love life.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We learn more about Linda's upbringing and gain insight into her world after a series of mishaps which led her to quit her job. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie chases a high school fantasy, by reuniting with a high school crush who ends up being a jerk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has an extra ticket to Chicago and Reggie decides to go.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: A friend of and an old friend of Beckers is in town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker gets shot and Frances Fisher guest stars as his doctor. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Frances Fisher guest stars again as Dr. Elizabeth Carson and reveals to Becker her attraction to him

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and Liz realize that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff and Bob wins and loses to lottery tickets.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We find out how Jake becomes blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend, and himself. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts to appreciate life after spending an evening in the morgue identifying one of his patients.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous freedom trails out of Nazi controlled France, taking him through the valleys and high ridges of the Pyrenees mountains and into Spain.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Vidkun Quisling
programme.desc: Vidkun Quisling, once honored for diplomacy, turned traitor by collaborating with Nazis. His bid for power in Norway failed, relegated by Germans. Despite being named "fuehrer," his reign led to repression until his hanging post-Nazi defeat.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Devil's Due
programme.desc: During WWII, Greek Prime Ministers Tsolakoglou, Logothetopoulos, and Rallis collaborated with Nazi occupiers, imposing fees that caused a famine.

programme.title: Hitler's Mega Plane
programme.desc: In January 2012, Italian divers discovered the wreck of a massive plane off the coast of Sardinia. At a depth of 65 meters (213 feet) lies a Messerschmidt “Gigant”, the biggest aircraft in WWII.

programme.title: Secret War: The Dutch Disaster
programme.desc: Operation North Pole was a WWII German deception using captured SOE agents to mislead Britain. 47 of 50 agents were captured. Despite warnings, SOE ignored signs of compromise to maintain support, leading to a major intelligence failure.

programme.title: Secret War: The Mafia Connection
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano, a mafia boss of the 1930s, was in jail in 1942 on charges of running prostitution rings. US intelligence services did a deal with him and he got the Italians to share intelligence on German U boat movements.

programme.title: Hitler and I: Reflections on Evil
programme.desc: An in-depth, behind-the-scenes exploration of the making of the miniseries "Hitler: The Rise of Evil."

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Arajs Kommando
programme.desc: Viktor Arajs, a Latvian, played a significant role in the Holocaust, collaborating with the Nazis to eliminate Jews. Leading the Arajs Kommando, he orchestrated the killings of around 30,000 Jews. Arajs justified his actions as patriotic defense.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The IRA Conspiracy
programme.desc: During WWII, the IRA's "S Plan" aimed to bomb Britain, drawing German support to weaken the British. "Operation Green" and "Plan Kathleen" envisioned IRA aiding a German invasion of Northern Ireland, but both failed due to bungling and infighting.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Good Collaborators?
programme.desc: Finland defended itself in the Winter War under Marshal Mannerheim. Finland allied with Nazi Germany against the Soviet Union in 1941. Finland later negotiated peace with the Allies and switched sides as Nazi defeat became apparent.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Croatian Collaborator
programme.desc: Croatia grapples with its fascist past through figures like Dinko Sakic, once hailed as a hero but later convicted of war crimes. Leading the notorious Jasenovac camp, Sakic oversaw brutal atrocities against inmates.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Preparing for War
programme.desc: Hitler unveils his military plans: annex Austria, seize the Sudetenland, and eventually invade Poland and the Soviet Union. By March 1938, Austria falls bloodlessly. By September 1939, he invades Poland, sparking World War Two.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Artillery, "The King of Battle," has shaped history from ancient cannons to today's M777 Howitzer. Host Wil Willis visits Fort Sill, Oklahoma, to witness modern artillery like the M777 and M109 Paladin in action.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Weapons That Changed The World examines the RPG-7, renowned for its ability to take on tanks and level buildings. Host Wil Willis traces its evolution from WWII's Bazooka to modern counterparts like the AT-4 and Carl Gustav.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: Japan attacks the USA on 7 Dec 1941. For the next 6 months, they continue to have successful attacks.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: The Sulmona Trail
programme.desc: Monty follows the route taken by prisoner of war Len Harley, who spent months on the run before braving snow, ice, and Nazi patrols to escape over the mountains of the Majella in Italy.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed continue their UK tour, in Cardiff and Birmingham. They audition more girls hoping to make it in the world of modelling.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed judge the final round of auditions, giving hopefuls one last chance to secure a place at the boot camp

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls who have made it through the audition stage battle it out in boot camp. Twelve girls will be chosen to move into the house and the next stage of the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls face their first challenge after moving into the house and learn there will be a double elimination this week. Janice Dickinson helps decide who will be the first two girls eliminated from the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models are given complete makeovers before posing nude for a photo shoot. George Lamb joins the judging panel this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls have to pose with different birds of prey and tensions there ends up being tension between some of the girls. Jasmine Guinness joins the judging panel to decide who will be eliminated this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models go one-on-one interviews with The Wanted but for some girls the mistakes just keep coming. Fashion designer Henry Holland joins the judges at panel and it becomes time to rise and smize or become a catwalk casualty.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The seven remaining girls face another double elimination this week and find themselves being thrown in at the deep end. Katie Price joins the judges on the panel this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final five girls left in the running complete in a beauty shoot before preparing to fly off to Miami. In a dramatic turn of events one of the girls is left behind and her place in the contest becomes uncertain.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In Miami, the top four girls must try their hands at acting, before shaking their pompoms and becoming brides for the day

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: It's the penultimate week of the contest, and four girls remain. The quartet attend 'go sees' and complete the last photo shoot of the series. Who will make the final?

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: From thousands of hopefuls, just two remain to battle it out on the catwalk. Who will Elle Macpherson crown as Britain & Ireland's Next Top Model?

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 1
programme.desc: The show returns for an eighth series with 20 contestants all competing to impress judges Elle Macpherson, Tyson Beckford, Whitney Port and Julien Macdonald to win a contract with Models 1.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 2
programme.desc: The remaining 17 contestants meet with the judges for one-on-one interviews and are scheduled to have a photo shoot with camels in the desert, but it gets canceled due to a sandstorm.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 3
programme.desc: The 13 contestants move into the model house and have a housewarming party, where they are visited by Cycle 7 winner Jade Thompson.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 4
programme.desc: The remaining 12 contestants receive makeovers at the Daniel Galvin salon and get their teeth whitened before being treated to a day out at a skating disco.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 5
programme.desc: The contestants go to the Hurlingham Academy and meet image consultant Vernon Francois for a challenge in which they decorate t-shirts and talk about their insecurities in a motivational speech for the school's students.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The contestants shoot a mock commercial for Alcatel, where they pretend to talk to their lover over the phone with a script written in French.

programme.title: Dare, Dream, Dominate.: The Beginning
programme.desc: Begyndelsen. Mark O Madsen er stoppet som fighter – men kampen er langt fra slut. Sammen med Maria sætter han alt på spil i forsøget på at skabe Danmarks største MMA-show. Næsten allerede fra første skridt er udfordringerne overvældende.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi hires a pretty, young babysitter, Sophia (Victoria Justice), to watch the kids, and gets jealous when her daughter, Kate, goes to her instead for advice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam discovers that the pastor he hired for their wedding was a phony and he and Andi aren't really married, he scrambles to find a way to fix it before she finds out.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam needs to hire a new project manager, Andi accuses Adam of unconscious bias after he only interviews men for the job.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam notices his Dad's increasingly forgetful behavior, he struggles with how to approach him to discuss it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When the kids won't do their chores, Adam and Andi decide to go on strike too.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam thinks Kate's boyfriend, Tyler (Griffin Gluck), is a pothead, he decides to confront Tyler but doesn't get the support he expects from Andi.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam takes his kids to work with him for the day, they accidentally give his biggest client lice. Also, Andi feels like a bad mom when she's the only one in the family not to get lice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi agree on a present-free Valentine's Day, Adam gives the gift he planned for Andi to his mother instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi try to get back in their neighbors' good graces after no one shows up to their potluck.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi are caught off guard by unexpected expenses, they each decide to give up a luxury to pay them off.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi gets Bev (Swoosie Kurtz) a spot volunteering at the hospital, Joe becomes bored and starts spending too much time with Adam.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi and Adam disagree about Kate attending a dance with an older boy, Adam tries to outsmart Andi to win the argument.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to organize a birthday dinner for Andi and he discovers that managing guests isn't easy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi lose footage of an intimate moment they accidentally recorded, they have to track it down before anyone can see it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's folks decide to visit them for Easter, Adam and Andi have to keep the peace between both sets of parents.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam insists that pranks are harmless fun, Andi creates an elaborate hoax to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is determined to figure out what Andi's hiding when he discovers she's been keeping secrets from him for his own good.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Sakai faces a challenger known as 'Mr. Gourmet.' Komine is a world-class vegetable chef who feels right at home with the secret ingredient.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Can the former chef to Deng Xiaoping, Zeityen Wan, make magic with his noodle dishes in just one hour?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is the first pizza expert to enter Kitchen Stadium. What pizza can he create with squid?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Shigeo Yuasa is the head chef of the Okayama International Hotel. With test tubes and litmus papers, Yuasa uses shocking cooking techniques to get his meals to exacting pH levels.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Chiyo Cho has the support from the people of Kobe as he challenges Iron Chef Chen to a titanic tofu tussle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Called the 'Rokusaburo Michiba of the Atami region in Japan,' Challenger Kunio Santo battles it out with Iron Chef Sakai in the battle of clam.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Former challenger Kandagawa retaliates against the Iron Chefs by sending his head chef Keisuke Tamano. Tamano challenges Michiba to an ultimate grudge battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga welcomes Korean cuisine for the first time to Kitchen Stadium. Lee Myong Suk is the female evangelist of Korean cuisine in Japan.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The old and new of French cuisine battle each other. Challenger Isao Yanagidate opens the door to a long-term battle between Club Mistral and Club des Trentes.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Etsuo Joh, the god of sauces in classic French cuisine, takes on the Iron Chef Japanese, Rokusaburo Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga invites the very first diner cook to compete at Kitchen Stadium. Katsuo Omiya, trained in the French tradition, challenges Iron Chef Sakai to a tearful battle!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Dissatisfied with the results of their last encounter, Club Mistral is back for a rematch. Kazutaka Okabe challenges Sakai to a rematch of extreme grandeur.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In this battle of blue crab, Challenger Akaboshi Sou, a favorite cook of the royal family, takes on Iron Chef Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Esteemed chef and owner of the Italian restaurant Sabatini in Roppongi has sent his protégé Yukihiro Noda to go head-to-head with Iron Chef Chen in a fierce battle of sardines.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In the battle of sole at Kitchen stadium, Iron Chef Sakai faces off against Chef Takayoshi Kawai who heads the kitchen of the Pan Pacific Hotel in San Francisco.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Returning to Kitchen Stadium is the prestigious and young Japanese chef Haruyoshi Omino. Omino's specialty is creating formal Japanese dishes and will go up against the French-trained Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Li Jinlun, the world-renowned master of Cantonese food from the prestigious Mandarin Oriental Hotel in Japan, heads to Kitchen Stadium to battle against Iron Chef Chen.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: How will Iron Chef Sakai fight in this battle against Shinichi Suematsu, a nature-loving challenger from Nara who's known for his one-of-a-kind Italian dishes?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Cooking show celebrity Hisama Hirano is invited to Kitchen Stadium to go head-to-head with Iron Chef Chen.
programme.sub-title: Sea Urchin: Battle to the Death
